---
title: "Sequence Analysis for Methods in Ecology and Evolution"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
library(stats)
library(logistf)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ape)
library(pegas)
library(purrr)
library(forcats)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)
library(ggnewscale)

summary_tbl2 <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, function(res, nm) {
  d <- res$tier3$diag

  tibble::tibble(
    profile = nm,
    n_barcodes = length(res$barcodes_used),
    tier2_union_pos = dplyr::n_distinct(res$snps$POS),
    after_frac_low  = d$n_positions[stringr::str_detect(d$step, "^frac_low")][1],
    after_maf       = d$n_positions[stringr::str_detect(d$step, "^MAF")][1],
    after_alt_sup   = d$n_positions[stringr::str_detect(d$step, "^ALT_support")][1],
    final_panel     = d$n_positions[d$step == "final_intersection"][1]
  )
})

print(summary_tbl2)
```


```{r}
names(master_clean)
meta_edna <- master_clean %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    marver_conc = as.numeric(marver_conc_eDNA),
    num_lr_pcr_frag = as.numeric(num.fragments)
  ) %>%
  distinct(barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

# haplogroup assignment per profile
hg_success <- hm %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    success = ifelse(!is.na(haplogroup), 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

# merge
model_df <- hg_success %>%
  left_join(meta_edna, by = "barcode")

model_strict <- glm(success ~ marver_conc +
                              num_lr_pcr_frag,
                    data = model_df %>% filter(profile == "strict"),
                    family = binomial)

summary(model_strict)

```

```{r}

strict_success <- hm %>%
  filter(profile == "strict",
         sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    success = ifelse(!is.na(haplogroup), 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  distinct(barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

meta_strict <- master_clean %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    marver_conc_eDNA = as.numeric(marver_conc_eDNA),
    num_fragments = as.numeric(num.fragments),
    raw_fastq_reads = as.numeric(raw_fastq_reads),
    mapped_reads = as.numeric(mapped_primary_reads)
  ) %>%
  distinct(barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

model_df <- strict_success %>%
  left_join(meta_strict, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(success))

table(model_df$success)

names(hm)
```

```{r}
model_df <- strict_universe %>%
  left_join(strict_calls, by = "barcode") %>%
  mutate(success = tidyr::replace_na(success, 0L)) %>%
  left_join(
    master_clean %>%
      filter(profile == "moderate", sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
      transmute(
        barcode = as.character(barcode),
        marver_conc_eDNA   = as.numeric(marver_conc_eDNA),
        num_fragments      = as.numeric(num.fragments),
        raw_fastq_reads    = as.numeric(raw_fastq_reads),
        mapped_reads       = as.numeric(mapped_primary_reads)
      ) %>%
      distinct(barcode, .keep_all = TRUE),
    by = "barcode"
  )

```

```{r}
m1 <- glm(success ~ marver_conc_eDNA + num_fragments + mapped_reads,
          data = model_df,
          family = binomial)

summary(m1)
```

```{r}
m1_firth <- logistf(success ~ marver_conc_eDNA + 
                      num_fragments + 
                      mapped_reads,
                    data = model_df)

summary(m1_firth)
```

```{r}
m_frag <- logistf(success ~ num_fragments, data = model_df)
m_conc <- logistf(success ~ marver_conc_eDNA, data = model_df)
m_map  <- logistf(success ~ mapped_reads, data = model_df)

summary(m_frag)
summary(m_conc)
summary(m_map)
```


```{r}
callable_df <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(!is.na(edna_allele)) %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_callable = n_distinct(POS),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(barcode = edna_barcode)
meta_edna <- master_clean %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(
    profile,
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    marver_conc_eDNA = as.numeric(marver_conc_eDNA),
    num_fragments = as.numeric(num.fragments),
    mapped_reads = as.numeric(mapped_primary_reads)
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

model_df <- callable_df %>%
  left_join(meta_edna, by = c("profile","barcode"))

model_df <- model_df %>%
  mutate(log_reads = log10(mapped_reads + 1))

m_callable <- lm(n_callable ~ marver_conc_eDNA +
                                num_fragments +
                                log_reads,
                 data = model_df)

summary(m_callable)
```

```{r}

panel_sizes <- tibble(
  profile = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"),
  panel_size = c(146, 288, 453)
)

model_df <- model_df %>%
  left_join(panel_sizes, by = "profile") %>%
  mutate(prop_callable = n_callable / panel_size)

m_prop <- lm(prop_callable ~ marver_conc_eDNA +
                                num_fragments +
                                log_reads,
             data = model_df)

summary(m_prop)

```

```{r}

hapmat_to_dnabin <- function(hapmat_tbl) {
  stopifnot("barcode" %in% names(hapmat_tbl))
  mat <- hapmat_tbl %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix()
  ape::as.DNAbin(mat)
}

build_hapmat_N_from_alleles <- function(profile_name, barcodes_used, panel_pos) {
  alleles_panel %>%
    filter(profile == profile_name, barcode %in% barcodes_used, POS %in% panel_pos) %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode), POS = as.character(POS)) %>%
    select(barcode, POS, allele) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = POS, values_from = allele) %>%
    mutate(across(-barcode, ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "N", as.character(.x))))
}

compute_robustness_metrics <- function(profile_name, hapmat_tbl, pairs_df) {
  # hapmat_tbl: barcode + SNP columns (as characters)
  dna <- hapmat_to_dnabin(hapmat_tbl)

  # haplotype count
  h <- pegas::haplotype(dna)
  n_haps <- nrow(h)

  # pairwise distances on callable sites
  mat <- hapmat_tbl %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix()

  snp_dist_ignore_N <- function(a, b) {
    ok <- !(a %in% c("N", NA) | b %in% c("N", NA))
    if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
    sum(a[ok] != b[ok])
  }

  df_pairs <- pairs_df %>%
    filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode),
           sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
    # keep only pairs where both barcodes exist in this hapmat
    filter(barcode %in% rownames(mat), sample_pair %in% rownames(mat))

  if (nrow(df_pairs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      profile = profile_name,
      n_haplotypes = n_haps,
      n_pairs = 0L,
      n_exact_pairs = NA_integer_,
      mean_pairwise_diff = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  dists <- purrr::map2_dbl(df_pairs$barcode, df_pairs$sample_pair,
                          ~ snp_dist_ignore_N(mat[.x, ], mat[.y, ]))

  tibble(
    profile = profile_name,
    n_haplotypes = n_haps,
    n_pairs = nrow(df_pairs),
    n_exact_pairs = sum(dists == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_pairwise_diff = mean(dists, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

pairs_df <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair)

hap_ref_list <- purrr::imap(profile_results, ~ .x$hapmat)

panel_pos_all <- purrr::imap(profile_results, ~ as.double(.x$tier3$panel$POS))

barcodes_used <- purrr::imap(profile_results, ~ .x$barcodes_used)

hap_N_list <- purrr::imap(profile_results, function(res, nm) {
  build_hapmat_N_from_alleles(
    profile_name = nm,
    barcodes_used = res$barcodes_used,
    panel_pos = as.double(res$tier3$panel$POS)
  )
})

robust_ref <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_ref_list, \(hapmat, nm) {
  compute_robustness_metrics(nm, hapmat, pairs_df) %>%
    mutate(treatment = "REF_fill")
})

robust_N <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_N_list, \(hapmat, nm) {
  compute_robustness_metrics(nm, hapmat, pairs_df) %>%
    mutate(treatment = "N_coded")
})

robust_tbl <- bind_rows(robust_ref, robust_N) %>%
  arrange(profile, treatment)

robust_tbl

```

```{r}
            b = pmax(barcode, sample_pair),
            snp_distance) %>%
```

```{r}

  filter(profile == "strict", !is.na(sample_pair), snp_distance == 0) %>%
  transmute(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair) %>%
  distinct()

exact_from_paired_dist
```
```{r}
get_pair_dists <- function(profile_name, hapmat_tbl, pairs_df) {
  mat <- hapmat_tbl %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix()

  snp_dist_ignore_N <- function(a, b) {
    ok <- !(a %in% c("N", NA) | b %in% c("N", NA))
    if (!any(ok)) return(NA_real_)
    sum(a[ok] != b[ok])
  }

  pairs_df %>%
    filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode),
           sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
    filter(barcode %in% rownames(mat), sample_pair %in% rownames(mat)) %>%
    mutate(
      snp_distance = purrr::map2_dbl(barcode, sample_pair,
                                    ~ snp_dist_ignore_N(mat[.x,], mat[.y,]))
    )
}

pair_dists_strict_ref <- get_pair_dists("strict", hap_ref_list[["strict"]], pairs_df)

pair_dists_strict_ref %>%
  filter(snp_distance == 0) %>%
  select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair, snp_distance)
```

```{r}
anti_join(exact_from_paired_dist,
          pair_dists_strict_ref %>%
            filter(snp_distance == 0) %>%
            transmute(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair) %>%
            distinct(),
          by = c("profile","edna_barcode","tissue_barcode"))
```

```{r}
  hap_ref_list[["strict"]] %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix()
)

pairs_df %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs_raw = n(),
    n_pairs_kept = sum(barcode %in% mat_barcodes & sample_pair %in% mat_barcodes),
    n_drop_edna_missing = sum(!(barcode %in% mat_barcodes)),
    n_drop_tissue_missing = sum(!(sample_pair %in% mat_barcodes))
  )
```

```{r}
pairs_tbl <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  transmute(
    profile,
    edna_barcode   = barcode,
    tissue_barcode = sample_pair
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode)

pairs_tbl %>% count(profile)
```

```{r}
hm2 <- hm %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_type = as.character(sample_type)
  )

haplogroup_match_summary <- pairs_tbl %>%   
  left_join(
    hm2 %>%
      filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
      select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, edna_haplogroup = haplogroup),
    by = c("profile","edna_barcode")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    hm2 %>%
      filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
      select(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, tissue_haplogroup = haplogroup),
    by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")
  ) %>%
  mutate(hg_match = edna_haplogroup == tissue_haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = sum(!is.na(edna_haplogroup) & !is.na(tissue_haplogroup)),
    n_hg_match = sum(hg_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_hg_match = mean(hg_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .by = profile
  )

haplogroup_match_summary
```
```{r}
hm_clean <- hm %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
         haplogroup = str_trim(as.character(haplogroup)),
         haplotype  = str_trim(as.character(haplotype))) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_type, haplogroup, haplotype)

pairs_tbl <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  transmute(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair) %>%
  distinct()

pair_check <- pairs_tbl %>%
  left_join(hm_clean %>% filter(sample_type=="eDNA") %>%
              transmute(profile, edna_barcode=barcode,
                        edna_hg=haplogroup, edna_hap=haplotype),
            by=c("profile","edna_barcode")) %>%
  left_join(hm_clean %>% filter(sample_type=="tissue") %>%
              transmute(profile, tissue_barcode=barcode,
                        tissue_hg=haplogroup, tissue_hap=haplotype),
            by=c("profile","tissue_barcode")) %>%
  mutate(
    hap_match = edna_hap == tissue_hap,
    hg_match  = edna_hg  == tissue_hg
  )

pair_check %>% count(profile, hap_match, hg_match)
pair_check %>% filter(hap_match, !hg_match) %>% select(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode, edna_hg, tissue_hg, edna_hap, tissue_hap)
```

```{r}
    profile,

    b = pmax(barcode, sample_pair),
    snp_distance

pairs_unique %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_exact = sum(snp_distance == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_one_snp = sum(snp_distance == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_snp_diff = mean(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
pairs_unique %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    mean_snp_diff   = mean(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_snp_diff = median(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr_snp_diff    = IQR(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(snp_distance, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(snp_distance, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
pairs_unique %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    median_IQR = sprintf(
      "%0.1f (IQR %0.1f–%0.1f)",
      median(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
      quantile(snp_distance, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      quantile(snp_distance, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    mean = mean(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}

hg_match_tbl <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(
    profile     = as.character(profile),
    barcode     = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair,
         hg_edna = haplogroup) %>%
  left_join(
    master_clean %>%
      mutate(profile = as.character(profile), barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
      filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
      select(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, hg_tissue = haplogroup),
    by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_tissue)) %>%
  # collapse reciprocal duplicates
  transmute(
    profile,
    a = pmin(edna_barcode, tissue_barcode),
    b = pmax(edna_barcode, tissue_barcode),
    hg_edna, hg_tissue
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, a, b, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_hg_match = sum(hg_edna == hg_tissue, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_hg_match = mean(hg_edna == hg_tissue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
hg_match_tbl

```

```{r}

snp_dist_pairs_from_alleles <- function(df_pairs, alleles_panel, missing = c(NA, "N")) {

  ap <- alleles_panel %>%
    mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
           barcode = as.character(barcode),
           POS = as.double(POS),
           allele = as.character(allele))

  df_pairs %>%
    mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
           edna_barcode = as.character(edna_barcode),
           tissue_barcode = as.character(tissue_barcode)) %>%
    left_join(ap %>% rename(edna_barcode = barcode, allele_edna = allele),
              by = c("profile","edna_barcode","POS")) %>%
    left_join(ap %>% rename(tissue_barcode = barcode, allele_tissue = allele),
              by = c("profile","tissue_barcode","POS")) %>%
    group_by(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode) %>%
    summarise(
      n_comp = sum(!(allele_edna %in% missing | allele_tissue %in% missing), na.rm = TRUE),
      snp_distance = sum(
        !(allele_edna %in% missing | allele_tissue %in% missing) &
          (allele_edna != allele_tissue),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      prop_mismatch_callable = if_else(n_comp > 0, snp_distance / n_comp, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

true_pairs_unique <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  transmute(profile,
            edna_barcode = barcode,
            tissue_barcode = sample_pair) %>%
  transmute(profile,
            a = pmin(edna_barcode, tissue_barcode),
            b = pmax(edna_barcode, tissue_barcode)) %>%
  distinct(profile, a, b) %>%
  rename(edna_barcode = a, tissue_barcode = b)

pair_snp_metrics <- snp_dist_pairs_from_alleles(true_pairs_unique, alleles_panel)

pair_snp_metrics %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_exact = sum(snp_distance == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_one_snp = sum(snp_distance == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_snp_diff = mean(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prop_mismatch = mean(prop_mismatch_callable, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
true_pairs <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  transmute(
    profile,
    edna_barcode   = barcode,
    tissue_barcode = sample_pair
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode)

stopifnot(all(!is.na(true_pairs$edna_barcode)))
stopifnot(all(!is.na(true_pairs$tissue_barcode)))

panel_pos <- alleles_panel %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  distinct(profile, POS)


ap <- alleles_panel %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS),
    allele = as.character(allele)
  )

pair_pos <- true_pairs %>%
  inner_join(panel_pos, by = "profile")  # expands each pair to all panel POS in that profile

pair_alleles <- pair_pos %>%
  left_join(
    ap %>% rename(edna_barcode = barcode, allele_edna = allele),
    by = c("profile", "edna_barcode", "POS")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    ap %>% rename(tissue_barcode = barcode, allele_tissue = allele),
    by = c("profile", "tissue_barcode", "POS")
  )

missing <- c(NA, "N", "-", "?")

pair_snp_metrics <- pair_alleles %>%
  mutate(
    callable = !(allele_edna %in% missing | allele_tissue %in% missing),
    mismatch = callable & (allele_edna != allele_tissue)
  ) %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_comp = sum(callable, na.rm = TRUE),
    snp_distance = sum(mismatch, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_mismatch_callable = if_else(n_comp > 0, snp_distance / n_comp, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pair_snp_metrics %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_exact = sum(snp_distance == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_one_snp = sum(snp_distance == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_snp_diff = mean(snp_distance, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_prop_mismatch = mean(prop_mismatch_callable, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_zero_comp = sum(n_comp == 0),
    min_comp = min(n_comp),
    median_comp = median(n_comp),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}

compute_mismatch_prop_matrix <- function(hapmat,
                                         missing = c("N", "-", "n", "?", NA)) {
  hm <- as.data.frame(hapmat)
  if (!("barcode" %in% names(hm))) hm <- tibble::rownames_to_column(hm, "barcode")

  barcodes <- hm$barcode
  X <- hm %>% dplyr::select(-barcode) %>% as.matrix()

  is_missing <- function(v) is.na(v) | v %in% missing

  n <- nrow(X)
  out <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n, dimnames = list(barcodes, barcodes))

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    for (j in i:n) {
      xi <- X[i, ]; xj <- X[j, ]
      callable <- !(is_missing(xi) | is_missing(xj))
      denom <- sum(callable)

      d <- if (denom == 0) NA_real_ else sum(xi[callable] != xj[callable]) / denom
      out[i, j] <- d
      out[j, i] <- d
    }
  }
  out
}

perm_test_with_distmat_A <- function(pairs_df,
                                     meta_df,
                                     dist_mat,
                                     profile_value,
                                     n_perm = 10000,
                                     seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  dat <- pairs_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
                  barcode = as.character(barcode),
                  sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(profile == profile_value,
                  !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
    { if ("sample_type" %in% names(.)) dplyr::filter(., sample_type == "eDNA") else . } %>%
    dplyr::distinct(barcode, sample_pair)
  tissue_pool <- meta_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
                  barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(profile == profile_value, sample_type == "tissue") %>%
    dplyr::pull(barcode) %>%
    unique()

  # keep only pairs where both exist in dist matrix and tissues are in pool
  ok <- dat$barcode %in% rownames(dist_mat) &
        dat$sample_pair %in% colnames(dist_mat) &
        dat$sample_pair %in% tissue_pool
  dat <- dat[ok, , drop = FALSE]

  n_pairs <- nrow(dat)
  if (n_pairs == 0 || length(tissue_pool) == 0) {
    return(list(n_pairs = n_pairs, obs_mean = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, perm_means = numeric()))
  }

  eDNA_bcs <- dat$barcode
  true_t   <- dat$sample_pair

  # observed mean distance for true pairs
  obs <- purrr::map2_dbl(eDNA_bcs, true_t, ~ as.numeric(dist_mat[.x, .y]))
  obs_mean <- mean(obs, na.rm = TRUE)

  replace_t <- length(tissue_pool) < n_pairs

  perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
    rand_t <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = replace_t)
    d <- purrr::map2_dbl(eDNA_bcs, rand_t, ~ as.numeric(dist_mat[.x, .y]))
    mean(d, na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  # one-sided: TRUE pairs more similar => smaller distance
  p <- mean(perm_means <= obs_mean)

  list(n_pairs = n_pairs, obs_mean = obs_mean, p_value = p, perm_means = perm_means)
}

# dist_mats: named list where names are profiles, each element is a dist matrix
dist_mats <- purrr::imap(profile_results, ~ compute_mismatch_prop_matrix(.x$hapmat))

results_perm <- purrr::imap_dfr(dist_mats, \(dm, prof) {
  res <- perm_test_with_distmat_A(
    pairs_df = paired_valid_edna,
    meta_df  = master_clean,          # must include profile, barcode, sample_type
    dist_mat = dm,
    profile_value = prof,
    n_perm = 10000,
    seed = 123
  )
  tibble::tibble(profile = prof, n_pairs = res$n_pairs, obs_mean = res$obs_mean, p_value = res$p_value)
})

results_perm

```

```{r}
master_clean %>% count(profile, sample_type)
```

```{r}

pair_mismatch_counts <- function(hapmat, missing = c("N","-","n","?"), include_callable_n = TRUE) {
  hm <- as.data.frame(hapmat, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!("barcode" %in% names(hm))) hm <- rownames_to_column(hm, "barcode")

  barcodes <- hm$barcode
  X <- hm %>% select(-barcode) %>% as.matrix()

  is_miss <- function(v) is.na(v) | v %in% missing

  n <- nrow(X)
  mm <- matrix(NA_integer_, n, n, dimnames = list(barcodes, barcodes))
  cc <- matrix(NA_integer_, n, n, dimnames = list(barcodes, barcodes))

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    for (j in i:n) {
      xi <- X[i, ]; xj <- X[j, ]
      callable <- !(is_miss(xi) | is_miss(xj))
      cnum <- sum(callable)

      mnum <- if (cnum == 0) NA_integer_ else sum(xi[callable] != xj[callable])

      mm[i, j] <- mnum; mm[j, i] <- mnum
      cc[i, j] <- cnum; cc[j, i] <- cnum
    }
  }

  if (include_callable_n) list(mismatch = mm, callable = cc) else mm
}



```

```{r}
    n_edna   = sum(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
    has_edna   = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    composition = case_when(
      has_tissue & has_edna  ~ "mixed",
      has_tissue & !has_edna ~ "tissue_only",
      has_edna & !has_tissue ~ "edna_only"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
      has_tissue & has_edna  ~ "mixed",
      has_tissue & !has_edna ~ "tissue_only",
      has_edna & !has_tissue ~ "edna_only",
```

```{r}

cap_use <- 20

barcode_hg <- imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  hg_map <- cluster_haplogroups_cap(obj$h, target_max = cap_use)
  # hg_map columns: haplotype, haplogroup_cap
  hap_membership_hg %>%
    filter(profile == nm) %>%
    mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
           barcode = as.character(barcode),
           sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
           haplotype = as.character(haplotype)) %>%
    left_join(hg_map, by = "haplotype") %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
})

barcode_hg %>% count(profile, is.na(haplogroup_cap))
barcode_hg %>% count(profile, haplogroup_cap, sample_type) %>% arrange(profile, haplogroup_cap)

hg_comp_cap <- barcode_hg %>%
  filter(!is.na(haplogroup_cap), sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup_cap) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total  = n_distinct(barcode),
    n_tissue = sum(sample_type == "tissue"),
    n_edna   = sum(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
    has_edna   = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    composition = case_when(
      has_tissue & has_edna  ~ "mixed",
      has_tissue & !has_edna ~ "tissue_only",
      has_edna & !has_tissue ~ "edna_only"
    )
  )

# summary counts
hg_comp_cap %>% count(profile, composition, name = "n_haplogroups")

# n per haplogroup
hg_comp_cap %>% arrange(profile, composition, desc(n_total))
```

```{r}
  mutate(success = !is.na(eDNA_sex))

  geom_point(aes(color = success, size = marver_conc)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey60","red3")) +
  theme_bw() +

       size = "MarVer concentration (ng/µL)",
       x = "Longitude",
```

```{r}
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Number of long-range PCR fragments",
       fill = "Sex recovered?")
```

```{r}

sex_plot <- sexing %>%
  filter(!is.na(eDNA_sex)) %>%   # remove unsuccessful eDNA sex calls
  mutate(sample_id = row_number()) %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id,
    eDNA   = tolower(eDNA_sex),
    Tissue = tolower(Tissue_Sex_SRY)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(eDNA, Tissue),
               names_to = "sample_type",
               values_to = "sex") %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("eDNA", "Tissue")),
    sample_id   = factor(sample_id, levels = rev(unique(sample_id)))
  )

ggplot(sex_plot, aes(x = sample_type, y = sample_id, fill = sex)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "female" = "#e78ac3",   # pink
      "male"   = "#4ea3de"    # blue
    ),
    na.value = "white"
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Tissue" = "tissue")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Sex")

```

```{r}
  transmute(
    sample_id,
    eDNA   = tolower(eDNA_sex),
    Tissue = tolower(Tissue_Sex_SRY)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(eDNA, Tissue),
               names_to = "sample_type",
               values_to = "sex") %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("eDNA", "Tissue")),
    sample_id   = factor(sample_id, levels = rev(unique(sample_id)))
  )
```

```{r}
paired_dist <- readr::read_csv("paired_dist.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")),
    sample_type = tolower(sample_type)
  )
names(paired_dist)
write.csv(paired_dist, "paired_dist.csv")

pairs_one <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_barcode = case_when(
      sample_type == "tissue" ~ barcode,
      sample_type == "edna"   ~ sample_pair,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    edna_barcode = case_when(
      sample_type == "edna"   ~ barcode,
      sample_type == "tissue" ~ sample_pair,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_barcode), !is.na(edna_barcode)) %>%
  mutate(pair_id = paste(tissue_barcode, "vs", edna_barcode)) %>%
  distinct(profile, pair_id, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

pairs_one %>% count(profile)
```


```{r}
best_per_edna <- pairs_one %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode) %>%
  slice_max(concord_rate, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(best_per_edna, aes(x = haplogroup, y = concord_rate)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.15, height = 0), alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Haplogroup", y = "Concordance")

```

```{r}

hg_lut <- paired_dist %>%
  select(barcode, haplogroup, haplotype) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_one <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_barcode = if_else(sample_type == "tissue", barcode, sample_pair),
    edna_barcode   = if_else(sample_type == "edna",   barcode, sample_pair)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_barcode), !is.na(edna_barcode)) %>%
  transmute(
    profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode,
    n_panel_sites, n_alt_sites, marver_conc_eDNA
  ) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("tissue_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(tissue_haplogroup = haplogroup, tissue_haplotype = haplotype) %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("edna_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(edna_haplogroup = haplogroup, edna_haplotype = haplotype)

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  mutate(same_haplogroup = tissue_haplogroup == edna_haplogroup)

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  mutate(concord = 1 - (n_alt_sites / n_panel_sites))

ggplot(pairs_one, aes(x = same_haplogroup, y = concord)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Same haplogroup?", y = "Concordance")
```

```{r}
hg_in_edna <- pairs_one %>%
  pull(edna_haplogroup) %>%
  unique()

pairs_filtered <- pairs_one %>%
  filter(tissue_haplogroup %in% hg_in_edna)

within_hg_rank <- pairs_one %>%
  filter(tissue_haplogroup == edna_haplogroup) %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode) %>%
  arrange(desc(concord)) %>%
  mutate(rank_within_hg = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

```

```{r}
pairs_ranked <- pairs_one %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode) %>%
  arrange(desc(concord), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(pairs_ranked, aes(x = rank, y = concord)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(profile ~ edna_barcode, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Tissue rank (best → worst)",
    y = "Concordance"
  )
```


```{r}
pairs_tbl <- pairs_one %>%
  transmute(
    profile,
    tissue_barcode,
    edna_barcode,
    pair_id = paste(tissue_barcode, "vs", edna_barcode)
  ) %>%
  distinct()
panel_index <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

tissue_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  select(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, POS, tissue_allele = allele)

edna_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, POS, edna_allele = allele)

conc_plot <- pairs_tbl %>%
  left_join(tissue_calls, by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")) %>%   # expands to all tissue SNPs
  left_join(edna_calls,   by = c("profile","edna_barcode","POS")) %>% # adds eDNA allele if present
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      is.na(edna_allele) ~ "no eDNA call",
      edna_allele == tissue_allele ~ "match",
      TRUE ~ "mismatch"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(panel_index, by = c("profile","POS"))

conc_plot %>% count(profile, status)
conc_plot %>% summarise(any_na_index = any(is.na(snp_index)))

```

```{r}

ggplot(conc_plot, aes(x = snp_index, y = pair_id, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("match" = "green3", "mismatch" = "red3", "no eDNA call" = "white")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
  ) +
  labs(x = "SNP index (panel order)", y = "Tissue ↔ eDNA pair", fill = NULL)
```


```{r}
base_tile <- function(df, prof) {

  df_prof <- df %>% filter(profile == prof)
  stopifnot(nrow(df_prof) > 0)
  pair_levels <- df_prof %>%
    group_by(pair_id) %>%
    summarise(mismatch_rate = mean(status == "mismatch", na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(mismatch_rate) %>%
    pull(pair_id)

  df_prof <- df_prof %>%
    mutate(pair_id = factor(pair_id, levels = pair_levels)) %>%
    mutate(pair_id = fct_rev(pair_id))  

  ggplot(df_prof, aes(x = snp_index, y = pair_id, fill = status)) +
    geom_tile(height = 0.9) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("match" = "#5E3C99",
                 "mismatch" = "#E6E6E6",
                 "no eDNA call" = "red")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "SNP index",
      y = "Tissue/eDNA pair",
      fill = NULL
    )
}

p_strict   <- base_tile(conc_plot, "strict")
p_moderate <- base_tile(conc_plot, "moderate")
p_relaxed  <- base_tile(conc_plot, "relaxed")

p_strict
p_moderate
p_relaxed
```

```{r}

pairs_new <- conc_plot %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    edna_barcode = as.character(edna_barcode),
    tissue_barcode = as.character(tissue_barcode)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_new %>% count(profile)
```

```{r}
pair_alleles2_new <- conc_plot %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    edna_barcode = as.character(edna_barcode),
    tissue_barcode = as.character(tissue_barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS),
    snp_index = as.integer(snp_index),
    allele_edna = na_if(as.character(edna_allele), "N"),
    allele_tissue = na_if(as.character(tissue_allele), "N")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    both_called = !is.na(allele_edna) & !is.na(allele_tissue),
    match = both_called & (allele_edna == allele_tissue),
    mismatch = both_called & (allele_edna != allele_tissue),
    pair_id = paste(tissue_barcode, "vs", edna_barcode)
  )

per_snp_agree_new <- pair_alleles2_new %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, snp_index) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n_distinct(pair_id),
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    agree_rate = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

diag_df2_new <- per_snp_agree_new %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  arrange(snp_index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%   
  mutate(shared = !is.na(agree_rate) & agree_rate >= 0.8) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_diag_one2 <- function(df, prof) {
  d <- df %>% filter(profile == prof)
  ggplot(d, aes(snp_index, snp_index)) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    geom_point(data = subset(d, shared), size = 1.6) +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(1, max(d$snp_index)), ylim = c(1, max(d$snp_index))) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(prof, " panel (", max(d$snp_index), " SNPs)"),
      subtitle = "Dots = SNPs with ≥80% allele agreement across\n paired eDNA–tissue (among callable pairs)",
      x = "SNP",
      y = "SNP"
    )
}

p_strict2   <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2_new, "strict")
p_moderate2 <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2_new, "moderate")
p_relaxed2  <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2_new, "relaxed")

p_relaxed2
```

```{r}
pair_level_new <- pair_alleles2_new %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode, pair_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pair_level_new %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pair_match = mean(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_pair_match = median(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(pair_level_new, aes(x = profile, y = prop_match)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "Proportion of matching genotypes per paired sample", x = "Filtering profile")

```

```{r}
names(pair_level_new)

```

```{r}

paired_dist <- paired_dist %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair),
    sample_type = tolower(sample_type)
  )

pairs_tbl <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  filter(isTRUE(pair_exists_in_profile) | pair_exists_in_profile == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_barcode = if_else(sample_type == "tissue", barcode, sample_pair),
    edna_barcode   = if_else(sample_type == "edna",   barcode, sample_pair)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_barcode), !is.na(edna_barcode)) %>%
  transmute(profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(pair_id = paste(tissue_barcode, "vs", edna_barcode))

pairs_tbl %>% count(profile)

```

```{r}

tissue_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         POS = as.double(POS),
         barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  transmute(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, POS, allele_tissue = allele)

edna_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         POS = as.double(POS),
         barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  transmute(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, POS, allele_edna = allele)

pair_alleles <- pairs_tbl %>%
  left_join(tissue_calls, by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")) %>%        
  left_join(edna_calls,   by = c("profile","edna_barcode","POS"))       

pair_alleles2 <- pair_alleles %>%
  mutate(
    allele_edna   = na_if(as.character(allele_edna), "N"),
    allele_tissue = na_if(as.character(allele_tissue), "N"),
    both_called = !is.na(allele_edna) & !is.na(allele_tissue),
    match    = both_called & (allele_edna == allele_tissue),
    mismatch = both_called & (allele_edna != allele_tissue),
    no_edna_call = is.na(allele_edna) & !is.na(allele_tissue),
    status = case_when(
      no_edna_call ~ "no eDNA call",
      match ~ "match",
      mismatch ~ "mismatch",
      TRUE ~ "other"
    )
  )

panel_index <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

pair_snp <- pair_alleles2 %>%
  left_join(panel_index, by = c("profile","POS"))

```

```{r}

pair_summary <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(status %in% c("match","mismatch")) %>%  
  group_by(profile, pair_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called   = n(),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch"),
    concordance = 1 - (n_mismatch / n_called),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pair_summary <- pair_summary %>%
  mutate(
    class = case_when(
      concordance >= 0.95 ~ "high-confidence match",
      concordance <= 0.20 ~ "non-match candidate",
      TRUE                ~ "ambiguous"
    )
  )

p_pair_conc <- pair_summary %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(pair_id_ord = fct_reorder(pair_id, concordance)) %>%  
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = concordance, y = fct_rev(pair_id_ord), shape = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)) +
  labs(x = "Concordance (1 - mismatches / called SNPs)",
       y = "Tissue ↔ eDNA pair",
       shape = NULL)

p_pair_conc

```

```{r}

hc_pairs_strict <- pair_summary %>%
  filter(profile == "strict", class == "high-confidence match") %>%
  pull(pair_id)

snp_mismatch <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(profile == "strict",
         pair_id %in% hc_pairs_strict,
         status %in% c("match","mismatch")) %>%
  group_by(POS) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs_called = n(),  
    mismatch_rate  = mean(status == "mismatch"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mismatch_rate))

p_snp_mismatch <- snp_mismatch %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = POS, y = mismatch_rate)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "POS (panel order)", y = "Mismatch rate among high-confidence matches")
```

```{r}
per_snp_agree <- pair_snp %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, snp_index) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n_distinct(pair_id),
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    agree_rate = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
diag_df2 <- per_snp_agree %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  arrange(snp_index, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(shared = !is.na(agree_rate) & agree_rate >= 0.8) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_diag_one2 <- function(df, prof) {
  d <- df %>% filter(profile == prof)
  ggplot(d, aes(snp_index, snp_index)) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    geom_point(data = subset(d, shared), size = 1.6) +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(1, max(d$snp_index)), ylim = c(1, max(d$snp_index))) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(prof, " panel (", max(d$snp_index), " SNPs)"),
      subtitle = "Dots = SNPs with ≥80% allele agreement across paired eDNA/tissue",
      x = "SNP index",
      y = "SNP index"
    )
}

p_strict2   <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "strict")
p_moderate2 <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "moderate")
p_relaxed2  <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "relaxed")
```

```{r}
  group_by(profile, pair_id, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),

  )

ggplot(pair_level, aes(x = profile, y = prop_match)) +
```

```{r}
pairs_tbl %>% count(profile)
```

```{r}
pair_snp %>% count(profile, status)

```

```{r}

paired_barcodes <- pairs_tbl %>%
  select(profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode),
               names_to = "side", values_to = "barcode") %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode)

pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  inner_join(paired_barcodes, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    support_class = case_when(
      tissue_alt & edna_alt  ~ "Shared (tissue + eDNA)",
      tissue_alt & !edna_alt ~ "tissue only",
      !tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "eDNA only",
      TRUE ~ "No ALT"
    ),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  ) %>%
  filter(support_class != "No ALT")  

```


```{r}
p_rug <- ggplot(pos_support, aes(x = POS, y = 0, color = support_class)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.4, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "fixed") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Shared (tissue + eDNA)" = "#00A651",
      "tissue only"            = "lightgrey"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position (bp)", color = NULL)

p_rug
```

```{r}
pair_level <- pair_snp %>%
  group_by(profile, pair_id, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

obs_stats <- pair_level %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = mean(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

obs_stats

```

```{r}

compute_random_concord <- function(profile_name, tissues, ednas, pair_snp) {

  n_pairs <- min(length(tissues), length(ednas))
  rand_tissue <- sample(tissues, n_pairs, replace = FALSE)
  rand_edna   <- sample(ednas,   n_pairs, replace = FALSE)

  rand_pairs <- tibble(
    profile = profile_name,
    tissue_barcode = rand_tissue,
    edna_barcode   = rand_edna
  )

  d <- rand_pairs %>%
    left_join(pair_snp, by = c("profile","tissue_barcode","edna_barcode"))

  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  pair_level_rand <- d %>%
    group_by(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
    summarise(
      n_called = sum(status != "no eDNA call", na.rm = TRUE),
      n_match  = sum(status == "match", na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match/n_called, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(prop_match))

  if (nrow(pair_level_rand) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  mean(pair_level_rand$prop_match)
}

set.seed(123)

profile_name <- "strict"

tissues <- pair_level %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  distinct(tissue_barcode) %>%
  pull()

ednas <- pair_level %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  distinct(edna_barcode) %>%
  pull()

n_perm <- 5000
perm_means <- numeric(n_perm)

for (i in seq_len(n_perm)) {
  perm_means[i] <- compute_random_concord(profile_name, tissues, ednas, pair_snp)
}

obs_mean <- obs_stats %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  pull(obs_mean)

p_val <- mean(perm_means >= obs_mean)

p_val

obs_stats %>% filter(profile == profile_name)

obs_mean <- obs_stats %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  pull(obs_mean)

obs_mean
length(obs_mean)

obs_mean <- obs_stats %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  summarise(obs_mean = mean(obs_mean, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(obs_mean)

stopifnot(length(obs_mean) == 1, !is.na(obs_mean))

p_val <- mean(perm_means >= obs_mean)
p_val

sum(is.na(perm_means))
summary(perm_means)

```

```{r}
sum(is.na(perm_means))
summary(perm_means)
obs_mean
```

```{r}

profile_name <- "moderate"

ref_lut <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$snps %>%
    transmute(
      profile = as.character(nm),
      POS = as.double(POS),
      allele_ref = as.character(REF)
    ) %>%
    distinct()
})

pair_snp2 <- pair_snp %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  left_join(ref_lut, by = c("profile","POS"))

compute_random_concord_alt <- function(profile_name, tissues, ednas, pair_snp2) {

  n_pairs <- min(length(tissues), length(ednas))
  rand_tissue <- sample(tissues, n_pairs, replace = FALSE)
  rand_edna   <- sample(ednas,   n_pairs, replace = FALSE)

  rand_pairs <- tibble(
    profile = profile_name,
    tissue_barcode = rand_tissue,
    edna_barcode   = rand_edna
  )

  d <- rand_pairs %>%
    left_join(pair_snp2, by = c("profile","tissue_barcode","edna_barcode"))

  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  d_alt <- d %>%
    filter(!is.na(allele_ref)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(allele_tissue)) %>%
    filter(allele_tissue != allele_ref)

  if (nrow(d_alt) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  pair_level <- d_alt %>%
    group_by(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
    summarise(
      n_sites = n(),
      n_match = sum(allele_tissue == allele_edna, na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_match = n_match / n_sites,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(prop_match))

  if (nrow(pair_level) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  mean(pair_level$prop_match)
}

set.seed(123)
for (i in seq_len(n_perm)) {
  perm_means_alt[i] <- compute_random_concord_alt(profile_name, tissues, ednas, pair_snp2)
}

obs_mean_alt <- pair_snp2 %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele_ref)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele_tissue)) %>%
  filter(allele_tissue != allele_ref) %>%   # tissue ALT sites only
  group_by(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sites = n(),
    n_match = sum(allele_tissue == allele_edna, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = n_match / n_sites,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  summarise(mean(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull()

obs_mean_alt

obs_mean_alt <- pair_snp2 %>%
  filter(profile == profile_name) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele_ref)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele_tissue)) %>%
  filter(allele_tissue != allele_ref) %>%   # tissue ALT sites only
  group_by(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sites = n(),
    n_match = sum(allele_tissue == allele_edna, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = n_match / n_sites,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  summarise(mean(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull()

obs_mean_alt

alt_sets2 <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  filter(is_alt) %>%                # ALT relative to REF_base

alt_sets2 %>% count(profile)
alt_sets2 %>% count(profile, barcode) %>% head()
```

```{r}
pairs_valid <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),

-
```



```{r}

# true pairs
pairs_valid <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair)

# allele long table
alleles_long <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS     = as.double(POS)) %>%
  select(profile, barcode, POS, allele)

# join eDNA + tissue alleles
pair_snp <- pairs_valid %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_long %>% rename(edna_barcode = barcode,
                            allele_edna = allele),
    by = c("profile", "barcode" = "edna_barcode")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_long %>% rename(sample_pair = barcode,
                            allele_tissue = allele),
    by = c("profile", "sample_pair", "POS")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    called_both = !is.na(allele_edna) & !is.na(allele_tissue),
    mismatch    = called_both & (allele_edna != allele_tissue)
  )

# compute mismatch rate per pair
pair_mismatch <- pair_snp %>%
  group_by(profile, barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(called_both),
    mismatch_rate = ifelse(n_called > 0,
                           sum(mismatch) / n_called,
                           NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

set.seed(123)
n_perm <- 10000

perm_results <- pair_mismatch %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{

    df <- .x
    prof <- .y$profile

    # observed mean mismatch
    obs_mean <- mean(df$mismatch_rate, na.rm = TRUE)

    edna_pool   <- df$barcode
    tissue_pool <- df$sample_pair
    n_pairs     <- nrow(df)
    lookup <- pair_mismatch %>%
      filter(profile == prof) %>%
      select(barcode, sample_pair, mismatch_rate)

    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {

      rand_tissue <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = FALSE)

      tibble(barcode = edna_pool,
             sample_pair = rand_tissue) %>%
        left_join(lookup, by = c("barcode","sample_pair")) %>%
        summarise(mean_val = mean(mismatch_rate, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
        pull(mean_val)
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs_mean,
           perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

results_perm <- perm_results %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = first(obs_mean),
    p_value  = mean(perm_mean <= obs_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

results_perm

```

```{r}
results_perm <- perm_results %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = first(obs_mean),
    p_value  = mean(perm_mean <= obs_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_valid  = sum(!is.na(perm_mean)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

results_perm
```

```{r}
ggplot(perm_results, aes(x = perm_mean)) + 
  geom_histogram(bins = 60) + 
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = obs_mean), linewidth = 1) + 
  facet_wrap(~ profile, scales = "free") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  labs(
    x = "Mean callable mismatch rate under random pairing", 
    y = "Count", 
    title = "True pairs are more similar than random (genotype concordance)"
  )
```
```{r}

alleles_panel2 <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS     = as.double(POS))

edna_calls <- alleles_panel2 %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, POS, allele_edna = allele)

tissue_calls <- alleles_panel2 %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  select(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, POS, allele_tissue = allele)

pairwise_pos <- edna_calls %>%
  inner_join(tissue_calls, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  mutate(mismatch = allele_edna != allele_tissue)

pairwise_metrics <- pairwise_pos %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_callable = n(),
    n_mismatch = sum(mismatch, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_mismatch_callable = n_mismatch / n_callable,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# require a minimum number of comparable sites so the metric is stable
MIN_CALLABLE <- 20
pairwise_metrics_f <- pairwise_metrics %>%
  filter(n_callable >= MIN_CALLABLE)


true_pairs <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, tissue_barcode = sample_pair)

obs_tbl <- true_pairs %>%
  inner_join(pairwise_metrics_f, by = c("profile","edna_barcode","tissue_barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    obs_mean = mean(prop_mismatch_callable, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
obs_tbl

```

```{r}

set.seed(123)
n_perm <- 10000

edna_pool_tbl <- pairwise_metrics_f %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    tissues = list(tissue_barcode),
    vals    = list(prop_mismatch_callable),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

perm_results <- true_pairs %>%
  inner_join(edna_pool_tbl, by = c("profile","edna_barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df   <- .x
    prof <- .y$profile[[1]] 
    # observed mean from true tissue partners (within this profile)
    obs <- true_pairs %>%
      filter(profile == prof) %>%
      inner_join(pairwise_metrics_f, by = c("profile","edna_barcode","tissue_barcode")) %>%
      summarise(m = mean(prop_mismatch_callable, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      pull(m)

    # permutation: for each eDNA barcode, sample 1 mismatch value from its valid tissue pool
    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
      sampled_vals <- purrr::map2_dbl(df$tissues, df$vals, ~ sample(.y, 1))
      mean(sampled_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs, perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

# p-value: proportion of null <= observed (lower mismatch = more similar)
results_perm <- perm_results %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = first(obs_mean),
    p_value  = mean(perm_mean <= obs_mean),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

results_perm

```


```{r}
set.seed(123)

metric_col <- "prop_mismatch_callable"   
n_perm <- 10000

perm_means_alt <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%   # true pairs subset
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[metric_col]]))
    n_pairs <- nrow(df)

    # observed mean for true pairs
    obs_mean <- mean(df[[metric_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

    # pools for random pairing (within profile)
    edna_pool   <- df$barcode
    tissue_pool <- unique(df$sample_pair)

    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
      rand_tissue <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = TRUE)
      mean(df[[metric_col]][match(rand_tissue, df$sample_pair)], na.rm = TRUE)
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs_mean, perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
metric_col <- "prop_mismatch_callable"
n_perm <- 10000

perm_means_alt <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair), !is.na(.data[[metric_col]])) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    n_pairs <- nrow(df)
    obs_mean <- mean(df[[metric_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
      perm_partner <- sample(df$sample_pair, n_pairs, replace = FALSE)
      NA_real_
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs_mean, perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>% ungroup()
```

```{r}
pairs_valid <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair)

alt_jaccard <- function(profile, edna_bc, tissue_bc, alt_sets2) {
  a <- alt_sets2 %>% filter(profile == !!profile, barcode == !!edna_bc) %>% pull(POS)
  b <- alt_sets2 %>% filter(profile == !!profile, barcode == !!tissue_bc) %>% pull(POS)
  if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(0)
  if (length(a) == 0 || length(b) == 0) return(1)

  inter <- length(intersect(a, b))
  uni   <- length(union(a, b))
  1 - (inter / uni)
}

set.seed(123)
n_perm <- 10000

perm_means_alt <- pairs_valid %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x
    n_pairs <- nrow(df)
    tissue_pool <- unique(df$sample_pair)
    # observed mean distance for true pairs
    obs <- mean(purrr::map2_dbl(df$barcode, df$sample_pair,
                               ~ alt_jaccard(df$profile[1], .x, .y, alt_sets2)))
    # null by random pairing (sample tissue partners at random)
    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
      rand_tissue <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = TRUE)
      mean(purrr::map2_dbl(df$barcode, rand_tissue,
                           ~ alt_jaccard(df$profile[1], .x, .y, alt_sets2)))
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs, perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
prof_levels <- c("strict","moderate","relaxed")

master_clean <- paired_dist %>%
  mutate(
    profile = factor(as.character(profile), levels = prof_levels),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA"),
    sample_type = case_when(
      str_to_lower(sample_type) %in% c("edna","e dna","e_dna") ~ "eDNA",
      str_to_lower(sample_type) %in% c("tissue") ~ "tissue",
      TRUE ~ as.character(sample_type)
    ),
    sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(profile, barcode) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

master_clean %>% count(profile, sample_type)
```

```{r}
      "tissue" = "grey70",
      "eDNA"   = "orchid2"
    )) + 
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Fragments amplified", y = "Breadth at ≥10×", fill = "Sample type")


```

```{r}
today_barcodes <- master_clean %>%
  transmute(profile = as.character(profile), barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  distinct()

today_barcodes <- pairs_tbl %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode), values_to = "barcode") %>%
  transmute(profile = as.character(profile), barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  distinct()

alt_support_by_pos <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {

  vaf_low    <- res$params$vaf_low
  min_alt_hi <- res$params$min_alt_hi

  panel_pos_nm <- res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
    distinct()

  res$snps %>%
    mutate(
      profile = nm,
      POS = as.double(POS),
      barcode = as.character(barcode),
      sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")),
      pass_alt = !is.na(vaf) & vaf >= vaf_low & alt_count >= min_alt_hi
    ) %>%
    filter(pass_alt) %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos_nm, by = "POS") %>%
    semi_join(today_barcodes %>% filter(profile == nm),
              by = "barcode") %>%              # <- TODAY restriction
    distinct(profile, POS, barcode, sample_type)
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = prof_levels))

alt_pos_counts <- alt_support_by_pos %>%
  count(profile, sample_type, POS, name = "n_alt_barcodes")

p_panel_dist_split <- ggplot(alt_pos_counts,
                             aes(x = POS, weight = n_alt_barcodes, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, position = "identity", alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position (bp)",
       y = "SNP support (sum of barcodes with ALT at site)",
       fill = "Sample type")
p_panel_dist_split

```

```{r}
p_panel_dist_split <- ggplot(
  alt_pos_counts,
  aes(x = POS, weight = n_alt_barcodes, fill = sample_type)
) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, position = "identity", alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "tissue" = "grey70",
      "eDNA"   = "orchid2"
    )
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Mitogenome position (bp)",
    y = "SNP support (sum of barcodes with ALT at site)",
    fill = "Sample type"
  )

p_panel_dist_split
```

```{r}
       aes(x = POS, y = n_callable, fill = sample_type)) +
```

```{r}

paired_barcodes <- pairs_tbl %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode),
               values_to = "barcode") %>%
  transmute(profile = as.character(profile), barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  distinct()

pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  inner_join(paired_barcodes, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    support_class = case_when(
      tissue_alt & edna_alt  ~ "Shared (tissue + eDNA)",
      tissue_alt & !edna_alt ~ "Tissue only",
      !tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "eDNA only",
      TRUE ~ "No ALT"
    ),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = prof_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(support_class != "No ALT")

```

```{r}

hm <- master_clean %>%
  select(profile, barcode, sample_type, haplotype, haplogroup) %>%
  distinct()

```

```{r}
strict_pos <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%
  distinct(POS)

depth_long_strict <- depth_long %>%
  semi_join(strict_pos, by = "POS")

meta <- master_clean %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),      
    haplogroup = as.character(haplogroup) 
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  filter(!is.na(barcode), !is.na(haplogroup))
meta_strict <- master_clean %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%     
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    haplogroup = as.character(haplogroup)
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(haplogroup = first(na.omit(haplogroup)), .groups = "drop")

plot_df <- depth_long %>%   
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.numeric(POS),
    DP  = as.numeric(DP)
  ) %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(haplogroup))

pos_index <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number())

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(pos_index, by = "POS") %>%
  mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))

barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(haplogroup, desc(mean_depth)) %>%
  pull(barcode)

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(barcode = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels))
hg_labs <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  count(haplogroup, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = paste0(haplogroup, " (n=", n, ")")) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(hg_labs, by = "haplogroup") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = factor(hg_lab, levels = hg_labs$hg_lab))

p_depth <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = snp_index, y = barcode, fill = depth_log)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_grid(hg_lab ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1, 50, 100, 150, max(plot_df$snp_index)),
                     expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    name = "Depth\nlog10(dp+1)",
    low = "#c7f0c2",
    high = "#6a00a8"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (ordered along mitogenome)",
    y = "Barcode (grouped by haplogroup)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey20", color = "grey20"),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "white"),
    legend.text  = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.title   = element_text(color = "white"),
    axis.text    = element_text(color = "white"),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "black", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "black", color = NA)
  )

p_depth

```

```{r}
# strict SNP set
strict_pos <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%
  distinct(POS)

# strict depth table (only those SNPs)
depth_long_strict <- depth_long %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.numeric(POS),
    DP  = as.numeric(DP)
  ) %>%
  semi_join(strict_pos, by = "POS")

# strict haplogroup meta (choose ONE of the two filters below)

meta_strict <- master_clean %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%          
  transmute(barcode = as.character(barcode),
            haplogroup = as.character(haplogroup)) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(haplogroup = first(na.omit(haplogroup)), .groups = "drop")

stopifnot(anyDuplicated(meta_strict$barcode) == 0)

# join + indices
plot_df <- depth_long_strict %>%
  left_join(meta_strict, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(haplogroup)) %>%
  mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))

pos_index <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number())

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")

# order barcodes within haplogroup by mean depth
barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(haplogroup, desc(mean_depth)) %>%
  pull(barcode) %>%
  unique()

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(barcode = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels))

# facet labels with n
hg_labs <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  count(haplogroup, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = paste0(haplogroup, " (n=", n, ")")) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(hg_labs, by = "haplogroup") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = factor(hg_lab, levels = hg_labs$hg_lab))

```

```{r}
meta_strict <- master_clean %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    haplogroup = as.character(haplogroup),
    sample_type = as.character(sample_type)
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    haplogroup = first(na.omit(haplogroup)),
    sample_type = first(na.omit(sample_type)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(meta_strict %>% select(barcode, sample_type),
            by = "barcode")
```
