```{r}

# one row per barcode for the strip
strip_df <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(strip_x = 0)

p_depth_strip <- ggplot() +

  # 1) sample-type strip (purple / grey)
  geom_tile(
    data = strip_df,
    aes(x = strip_x, y = barcode, fill = sample_type),
    width = 2   # <-- wider strip
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      tissue = "#7A7A7A",
      eDNA   = "#7B3294"
    ),
    name = "Sample type"
  ) +

  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +

  # 2) main depth heatmap (Magma)
  geom_tile(
    data = plot_df,
    aes(x = snp_index, y = barcode, fill = depth_log)
  ) +
  facet_grid(hg_lab ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Depth\nlog10(dp+1)",
    option = "magma"
  ) +

  # give room for strip at x=0
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(-2.5, NA)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0,0)) +

  labs(
    x = "SNP index (ordered along mitogenome)",
    y = "Barcode (grouped by haplogroup)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", color = "grey92"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_depth_strip
```

```{r}

prof <- "moderate"   # "strict" / "moderate" / "relaxed"
col_edna   <- "#7B3294"
col_tissue <- "#7A7A7A"

# SNP positions for this profile
pos_set <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(profile == prof) %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  mutate(POS = as.numeric(POS))

# depth table restricted to those SNPs
depth_prof <- depth_long %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS     = as.numeric(POS),
    DP      = as.numeric(DP),
    profile = if ("profile" %in% names(.)) as.character(profile) else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  { if (all(is.na(.$profile))) . else filter(., profile == prof) } %>%
  semi_join(pos_set, by = "POS")

# metadata 
meta_prof <- master_clean %>%
  filter(profile == prof, sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
  transmute(
    barcode     = as.character(barcode),
    sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
    haplogroup  = as.character(haplogroup)
  ) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    sample_type = first(na.omit(sample_type)),
    haplogroup  = first(na.omit(haplogroup)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_df <- depth_prof %>%
  left_join(meta_prof, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_type), !is.na(haplogroup)) %>%
  mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))

# SNP index within this profile (ordered along mitogenome)
pos_index <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number())

plot_df <- plot_df %>% left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")

# KEEP ONLY "mixed" haplogroups (both tissue + eDNA)/ drop singletons
hg_keep <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(haplogroup, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  group_by(haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total  = n_distinct(barcode),
    has_tiss = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
    has_edna = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_tiss, has_edna, n_total > 1) %>%
  pull(haplogroup)

plot_df <- plot_df %>% filter(haplogroup %in% hg_keep)

pos_index <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number())
plot_df <- plot_df %>% select(-snp_index) %>% left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")

# barcode ordering within haplogroup
barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(haplogroup, desc(mean_depth)) %>%
  pull(barcode) %>%
  unique()

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(barcode = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels))

# facet rows
hg_labs <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(haplogroup, barcode) %>%
  count(haplogroup, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = paste0(haplogroup, " (n=", n, ")")) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(hg_labs, by = "haplogroup") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = factor(hg_lab, levels = hg_labs$hg_lab))

strip_df <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(strip_x = 0)

label_df <- strip_df %>%
  distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(label_x = -6)  
p_depth_mixed <- ggplot() +
  geom_text(
  data = label_df,
  aes(x = label_x, y = barcode, label = barcode, color = sample_type),
  hjust = 1,
  size = 3,
  fontface = "bold" 
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), guide = "none") +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(
    data = strip_df,
    aes(x = 0, y = barcode, fill = sample_type),
    width = 3.5, height = 0.9,
    color = "white", linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), name = "Sample type") +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_tile(
    data = plot_df,
    aes(x = snp_index, y = barcode, fill = depth_log),
    height = 0.9
  ) +
  facet_grid(hg_lab ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Depth\nlog10(dp+1)", option = "magma") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-7, NA), expand = c(0,0)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 80)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index",
    y = "Barcode"
  )

p_depth_mixed


p_depth_mixed <- p_depth_mixed +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )

p_depth_mixed

```


```{r}

plot_depth_mixed_haplogroups <- function(
  prof,
  conc_plot,
  depth_long,
  master_clean,
  col_edna = "#7B3294",
  col_tissue = "#7A7A7A",
  label_x = -6,
  strip_x  = -2.5,
  strip_width = 2.8
) {
  pos_set <- conc_plot %>%
    filter(profile == prof) %>%
    distinct(POS) %>%
    mutate(POS = as.numeric(POS))

  stopifnot(nrow(pos_set) > 0)
  meta_prof <- master_clean %>%
    filter(profile == prof, sample_type %in% c("tissue", "eDNA")) %>%
    transmute(
      barcode     = as.character(barcode),
      sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
      haplogroup  = as.character(haplogroup)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(haplogroup)) %>%
    distinct()

  stopifnot(nrow(meta_prof) > 0)
  hg_keep <- meta_prof %>%
    group_by(haplogroup) %>%
    summarise(
      has_tiss = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
      has_edna = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(has_tiss, has_edna) %>%
    pull(haplogroup)

  if (length(hg_keep) == 0) {
    message("No mixed haplogroups for profile = ", prof, " in master_clean (haplogroup definitions).")
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta_prof <- meta_prof %>% filter(haplogroup %in% hg_keep)
  depth_prof <- depth_long %>%
    transmute(
      barcode = as.character(barcode),
      POS     = as.numeric(POS),
      DP      = as.numeric(DP)
    ) %>%
    semi_join(pos_set, by = "POS")

  stopifnot(nrow(depth_prof) > 0)

  plot_df <- depth_prof %>%
    inner_join(meta_prof, by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))
  
  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    missing_barcodes <- meta_prof %>%
      distinct(barcode) %>%
      anti_join(depth_prof %>% distinct(barcode), by = "barcode")

    message("plot_df is empty for profile = ", prof,
            ". Depth table has no rows for the mixed-group barcodes.\n",
            "Missing barcodes (first 20): ",
            paste(head(missing_barcodes$barcode, 20), collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }

  pos_index <- plot_df %>%
    distinct(POS) %>%
    arrange(POS) %>%
    mutate(snp_index = row_number())

  plot_df <- plot_df %>% left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")

  barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
    group_by(haplogroup, barcode, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(
      haplogroup,
      factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue", "eDNA")),
      desc(mean_depth)
    ) %>%
    pull(barcode) %>%
    unique()

  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(
      barcode   = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels),
      haplogroup = factor(haplogroup, levels = unique(plot_df$haplogroup))
    )

  strip_df <- plot_df %>% distinct(haplogroup, barcode, sample_type)
  label_df <- strip_df %>% mutate(x = label_x)
  strip_df <- strip_df %>% mutate(x = strip_x)

  ggplot() +    geom_text(
      data = label_df,
      aes(x = x, y = barcode, label = as.character(barcode), color = sample_type),
      hjust = 1, size = 3, fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), guide = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(
      data = strip_df,
      aes(x = x, y = barcode, fill = sample_type),
      width = strip_width, height = 0.9,
      color = "white", linewidth = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), name = "Sample type") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(
      data = plot_df,
      aes(x = snp_index, y = barcode, fill = depth_log),
      height = 0.9
    ) +
    facet_grid(haplogroup ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Depth\nlog10(dp+1)", option = "magma") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(label_x - 1, NA), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_blank(),

      plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 80)
    ) +
    labs(x = "SNP index", y = "Barcode")
}

p_strict   <- plot_depth_mixed_haplogroups("strict",   conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)
p_moderate <- plot_depth_mixed_haplogroups("moderate", conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)
p_relaxed  <- plot_depth_mixed_haplogroups("relaxed",  conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)

p_strict <- p_strict +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )
p_strict

```

```{r}
p_relaxed  <- plot_depth_mixed_haplogroups("relaxed",  conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)

p_relaxed <- p_relaxed +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )
p_relaxed

```

```{r}

plot_depth_edna_haplogroups_collapsed <- function(
  prof,
  conc_plot,
  depth_long,
  master_clean,
  col_edna = "#7B3294",
  col_tissue = "#7A7A7A",
  label_x = -6,
  strip_x  = -2.5,
  strip_width = 2.8,
  singleton_label = "eDNA-only singletons"
) {
  pos_set <- conc_plot %>%
    filter(profile == prof) %>%
    distinct(POS) %>%
    mutate(POS = as.numeric(POS))
  stopifnot(nrow(pos_set) > 0)
  meta_prof <- master_clean %>%
    filter(profile == prof, sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
    transmute(
      barcode     = as.character(barcode),
      sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
      haplogroup  = as.character(haplogroup)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(haplogroup)) %>%
    distinct()
  stopifnot(nrow(meta_prof) > 0)
  hg_keep <- meta_prof %>%
    group_by(haplogroup) %>%
    summarise(has_edna = any(sample_type == "eDNA"), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(has_edna) %>%
    pull(haplogroup)

  meta_prof <- meta_prof %>% filter(haplogroup %in% hg_keep)
  hg_meta <- meta_prof %>%
    group_by(haplogroup) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total  = n_distinct(barcode),
      n_edna   = sum(sample_type == "eDNA"),
      n_tissue = sum(sample_type == "tissue"),
      is_mixed = (n_edna > 0 & n_tissue > 0),
      is_edna_only_singleton = (n_edna > 0 & n_tissue == 0 & n_total == 1),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  depth_prof <- depth_long %>%
    transmute(
      barcode = as.character(barcode),
      POS     = as.numeric(POS),
      DP      = as.numeric(DP)
    ) %>%
    semi_join(pos_set, by = "POS")
  stopifnot(nrow(depth_prof) > 0)
  plot_df <- depth_prof %>%
    inner_join(meta_prof, by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))

  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    message("No depth rows after joining for profile = ", prof,
            ". (Depth table missing these barcodes.)")
    return(NULL)
  }
  pos_index <- plot_df %>%
    distinct(POS) %>%
    arrange(POS) %>%
    mutate(snp_index = row_number())
  plot_df <- plot_df %>% left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")
  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    left_join(hg_meta, by = "haplogroup") %>%
    mutate(
      hg_lab = ifelse(
        is_edna_only_singleton,
        singleton_label,
        paste0(haplogroup, " (n=", n_total, "; eDNA=", n_edna, ")")
      )
    )

  facet_levels <- hg_meta %>%
    mutate(hg_lab = ifelse(
      is_edna_only_singleton,
      singleton_label,
      paste0(haplogroup, " (n=", n_total, "; eDNA=", n_edna, ")")
    )) %>%
    arrange(desc(is_mixed), desc(n_edna), desc(n_total), haplogroup) %>%
    pull(hg_lab) %>%
    unique()
  facet_levels <- c(setdiff(facet_levels, singleton_label), singleton_label)

  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(hg_lab = factor(hg_lab, levels = facet_levels))
  barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
    group_by(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(
      hg_lab,
      factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")),
      desc(mean_depth)
    ) %>%
    pull(barcode) %>%
    unique()

  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(barcode = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels))

  strip_df <- plot_df %>%
    distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(x = strip_x)

  label_df <- strip_df %>%
    distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
    mutate(x = label_x)

  ggplot() +
    geom_text(
      data = label_df,
      aes(x = x, y = barcode, label = as.character(barcode), color = sample_type),
      hjust = 1, size = 3, fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), guide = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(
      data = strip_df,
      aes(x = x, y = barcode, fill = sample_type),
      width = strip_width, height = 0.9,
      color = "white", linewidth = 0.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(tissue = col_tissue, eDNA = col_edna), name = "Sample type") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_tile(
      data = plot_df,
      aes(x = snp_index, y = barcode, fill = depth_log),
      height = 0.9
    ) +
    facet_grid(hg_lab ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Depth\nlog10(dp+1)", option = "magma") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(label_x - 1, NA), expand = c(0,0)) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),

      plot.margin = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 5.5, l = 80)
    ) +
    labs(x = "SNP index", y = "Barcode")
}

# Example:
p_strict   <- plot_depth_edna_haplogroups_collapsed("strict", conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)
p_mod      <- plot_depth_edna_haplogroups_collapsed("moderate", conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)
p_relaxed  <- plot_depth_edna_haplogroups_collapsed("relaxed", conc_plot, depth_long, master_clean)


p_relaxed <- p_relaxed +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )

p_mod <- p_mod +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )

p_strict <- p_strict +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 50))  # increase until it clears labels
  )
p_relaxed
```

```{r}
  distinct(barcode, sample_type, hg_for_plot) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA")

n_edna_total <- edna_strict %>% nrow()

n_edna_assigned <- edna_strict %>%
```

```{r}


mod_pos <- conc_plot %>%
  filter(profile == "moderate") %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  mutate(POS = as.numeric(POS))

meta_base <- master_clean %>%
  transmute(
    barcode     = as.character(barcode),
    sample_type = as.character(sample_type),
    haplogroup  = as.character(haplogroup)
  ) %>%
  distinct()

# tissue-defined haplogroup per barcode (only tissues)
tissue_hg <- meta_base %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue", !is.na(haplogroup)) %>%
  distinct(barcode, haplogroup) %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(haplogroup_tissue = first(haplogroup), .groups = "drop")

meta <- meta_base %>%
  left_join(tissue_hg, by = "barcode") %>%
  mutate(hg_for_plot = coalesce(haplogroup_tissue, haplogroup)) %>%
  select(barcode, sample_type, hg_for_plot) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_for_plot)) %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    sample_type = first(sample_type),
    hg_for_plot = first(hg_for_plot),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stopifnot(anyDuplicated(meta$barcode) == 0)

depth_mod <- depth_long %>%
  transmute(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS     = as.numeric(POS),
    DP      = as.numeric(DP)
  ) %>%
  semi_join(strict_pos, by = "POS") %>%
  left_join(meta, by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_for_plot), !is.na(sample_type)) %>%
  mutate(depth_log = log10(DP + 1))

pos_index <- depth_mod %>%
  distinct(POS) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number())

plot_df <- depth_mod %>%
  left_join(pos_index, by = "POS")

hg_labs <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(hg_for_plot, barcode) %>%
  count(hg_for_plot, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = paste0(hg_for_plot, " (n=", n, ")")) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  left_join(hg_labs, by = "hg_for_plot") %>%
  mutate(hg_lab = factor(hg_lab, levels = hg_labs$hg_lab))

barcode_levels <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(mean_depth = mean(depth_log, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(
    hg_lab,
    factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")),
    desc(mean_depth)
  ) %>%
  pull(barcode) %>%
  unique()

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(barcode = factor(barcode, levels = barcode_levels))

strip_df <- plot_df %>%
  distinct(hg_lab, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(strip_x = 0)

```

```{r}
pair_hg <- pair_summary %>%
  filter(profile == "moderate") %>%
  separate(pair_id,
           into = c("barcode_1", "barcode_2"),
           sep = " vs ")
pair_hg <- pair_hg %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(barcode, sample_type, hg_for_plot),
            by = c("barcode_1" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(sample_type_1 = sample_type,
         hg_1 = hg_for_plot) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(barcode, sample_type, hg_for_plot),
            by = c("barcode_2" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(sample_type_2 = sample_type,
         hg_2 = hg_for_plot)

pair_hg <- pair_hg %>%
  mutate(
    hg_tissue = ifelse(sample_type_1 == "tissue", hg_1,
                       ifelse(sample_type_2 == "tissue", hg_2, NA)),
    hg_edna   = ifelse(sample_type_1 == "eDNA", hg_1,
                       ifelse(sample_type_2 == "eDNA", hg_2, NA))
  )

median_within_hg <- pair_hg %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_tissue), !is.na(hg_edna)) %>%
  mutate(same_hg = hg_tissue == hg_edna) %>%
  filter(same_hg) %>%
  summarise(med = median(concordance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(med)

median_within_hg

```


```{r}
median_between_hg <- pair_hg %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_tissue), !is.na(hg_edna)) %>%
  mutate(same_hg = hg_tissue == hg_edna) %>%
  filter(!same_hg) %>%
  summarise(med = median(concordance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(med)

median_between_hg
```

```{r}

pair_diag <- pair_snp %>%
  filter(profile == "moderate",
         POS %in% diag_pos,
         status %in% c("match","mismatch")) %>%
  group_by(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = n(),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch"),
    concordance_diag = 1 - n_mismatch / n_called,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(barcode, hg_for_plot),
            by = c("tissue_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(hg_tissue = hg_for_plot) %>%
  left_join(meta %>% select(barcode, hg_for_plot),
            by = c("edna_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(hg_edna = hg_for_plot) %>%
  mutate(same_hg = hg_tissue == hg_edna)

within_stats <- pair_diag %>%
  filter(same_hg) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    med = median(concordance_diag, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

between_stats <- pair_diag %>%
  filter(!same_hg) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    med = median(concordance_diag, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

within_stats
```

```{r}
diag_pos <- diagnostic_sites %>% pull(POS)  
length(diag_pos)  # 138

tissue_calls <- pair_snp %>%
  filter(profile == "strict", POS %in% diag_pos) %>%
  distinct(tissue_barcode, POS, allele_tissue) %>%
  rename(barcode = tissue_barcode, allele = allele_tissue) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele))

edna_calls <- pair_snp %>%
  filter(profile == "strict", POS %in% diag_pos) %>%
  distinct(edna_barcode, POS, allele_edna) %>%
  rename(barcode = edna_barcode, allele = allele_edna) %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele))

tissue_wide <- tissue_calls %>%
  mutate(POS = as.character(POS)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = POS, values_from = allele)

edna_wide <- edna_calls %>%
  mutate(POS = as.character(POS)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = POS, values_from = allele)

common_pos <- intersect(names(tissue_wide), names(edna_wide))
common_pos <- setdiff(common_pos, "barcode")

tissue_mat <- as.matrix(tissue_wide[, common_pos])
edna_mat   <- as.matrix(edna_wide[, common_pos])

rownames(tissue_mat) <- tissue_wide$barcode
rownames(edna_mat)   <- edna_wide$barcode

# function to compute concordance between one tissue row and all edna rows
conc_one_tissue <- function(t_row, edna_mat) {
  called <- !is.na(edna_mat) & !is.na(matrix(t_row, nrow=nrow(edna_mat), ncol=length(t_row), byrow=TRUE))
  n_called <- rowSums(called)
  n_match  <- rowSums(matches)
  conc <- n_match / n_called
  conc[n_called == 0] <- NA
  conc
}

conc_mat <- t(apply(tissue_mat, 1, conc_one_tissue, edna_mat = edna_mat))
dim(conc_mat)

conc_all <- as.data.frame(as.table(conc_mat)) %>%
  rename(tissue_barcode = Var1, edna_barcode = Var2, concordance = Freq) %>%
  filter(!is.na(concordance))

hg_lut <- meta %>% select(barcode, hg_for_plot)

conc_all <- conc_all %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("tissue_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(hg_tissue = hg_for_plot) %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("edna_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(hg_edna = hg_for_plot) %>%
  filter(!is.na(hg_tissue), !is.na(hg_edna)) %>%
  mutate(same_hg = hg_tissue == hg_edna)

summary_within_between <- conc_all %>%
  group_by(same_hg) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(concordance, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(concordance, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(concordance, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_within_between
```

```{r}
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "Same tissue-defined haplogroup?", y = "Concordance at diagnostic SNPs")
```

```{r}
  select(barcode, sample_type, hg_for_plot)

  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  select(tissue_barcode = barcode,
         hg_tissue = hg_for_plot)

  select(edna_barcode = barcode,
         hg_edna = hg_for_plot)

  filter(profile == "strict") %>%
  distinct(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode)

  left_join(hg_tissue, by = "tissue_barcode") %>%
  left_join(hg_edna, by = "edna_barcode") %>%

  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), color = "black") +

  theme_bw() +
```

```{r}

bc_type <- master_clean %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_type = if_else(sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA"), sample_type, NA_character_)
  )

names(alleles_panel)
site_alt_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  left_join(
    bc_type %>%
      transmute(profile = as.character(profile),
                barcode = as.character(barcode),
                sample_type_bc = sample_type),
    by = c("profile","barcode")
  ) %>%
  mutate(sample_type = coalesce(sample_type, sample_type_bc)) %>%
  select(-sample_type_bc) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_type)) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_alt_support = sum(is_alt, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_barcodes    = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
tmp <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  inner_join(bc_type, by = c("profile","barcode"))

names(tmp)

line_df <- site_alt_support %>%
  group_by(profile, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_alt_support = mean(n_alt_support, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_alt_support = median(n_alt_support, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

p_line <- ggplot(line_df, aes(x = profile, y = mean_alt_support,
                              group = sample_type, color = sample_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Profile (S/M/R)",
    y = "Mean ALT-support per panel SNP (barcodes)",
    title = "Tissue vs eDNA ALT-support across Tier-3 panel SNPs",
    color = "Sample type"
  )

p_line


```

```{r}
site_alt_support <- site_alt_support %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

p_box <- ggplot(site_alt_support, aes(x = sample_type, y = n_alt_support, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "ALT-support per panel SNP (barcodes)",
    title = "Per-site ALT-support: tissue vs eDNA (by profile)"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_box

```


```{r}
shared_pos <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  count(POS) %>%
  filter(n == 3) %>%
  pull(POS)

site_alt_support_shared <- site_alt_support %>%
  filter(POS %in% shared_pos)

line_df <- site_alt_support_shared %>%
  group_by(profile, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_alt_support = mean(n_alt_support, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_alt_support = median(n_alt_support, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

p_line <- ggplot(line_df, aes(x = profile, y = mean_alt_support,
                              group = sample_type, color = sample_type)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Profile (S/M/R)",
    y = "Mean ALT-support per panel SNP (barcodes)",
    title = "Tissue vs eDNA ALT-support across Tier-3 panel SNPs",
    color = "Sample type"
  )

p_box <- ggplot(site_alt_support_shared, aes(x = sample_type, y = n_alt_support, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "ALT-support per panel SNP (barcodes)",
    title = "Per-site ALT-support: tissue vs eDNA (by profile)"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_line + p_box + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 2))


```

```{r}
alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  inner_join(bc_type, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  names()
pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  select(-sample_type) %>%                    # <- key line
  inner_join(bc_type, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    support_class = case_when(
      tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "Shared (tissue + eDNA)",
      tissue_alt & !edna_alt ~ "Tissue-only",
      !tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "eDNA-only",
      TRUE ~ "No ALT (shouldn’t happen)"
    ),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )
# barcode -> sample_type lookup
bc_type <- master_clean %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode))
names(alleles_panel)
pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  inner_join(bc_type, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type.x == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type.x == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    support_class = case_when(
      tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "Shared (tissue + eDNA)",
      tissue_alt & !edna_alt ~ "Tissue only",
      !tissue_alt & edna_alt ~ "eDNA-only",
      TRUE ~ "No ALT (shouldn’t happen)"
    ),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )

p_rug <- ggplot(pos_support, aes(x = POS, y = 0, color = support_class)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.4, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "fixed") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Mitogenome position (bp)",
  )

p_rug



```

```{r}
p_rug <- ggplot(pos_support, aes(x = POS, y = 0)) +

  # grey first
  geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(pos_support, support_class == "tissue only"),
    aes(color = support_class),
    size = 1.6, alpha = 1
  ) +

  # green second
  geom_point(
    data = dplyr::filter(pos_support, support_class == "Shared (tissue + eDNA)"),
    aes(color = support_class),
    size = 1.6, alpha = 1
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, 16500)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Shared (tissue + eDNA)" = "#008B45",
      "tissue only"            = "grey55"
    ),
    breaks = c("Shared (tissue + eDNA)", "tissue only")  
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position (bp)", color = NULL)

p_rug
```

```{r}


# helper: long allele table from a hapmat (barcode + SNP columns)
hapmat_to_long <- function(hapmat, profile_name) {
  as_tibble(hapmat) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -barcode, names_to = "POS", values_to = "allele") %>%
    mutate(
      profile = profile_name,
      POS = as.double(POS)
    )
}

alleles_long <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  hapmat_to_long(res$hapmat, nm)
})

ref_long <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$snps %>%
    transmute(
      profile = nm,
      POS = as.double(POS),
      REF_base = as.character(REF)
    ) %>%
    distinct()
})

alleles_long2 <- alleles_long %>%
  left_join(master_clean %>% select(profile, barcode, sample_type),
            by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  left_join(ref_long, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  mutate(
    is_alt = !is.na(REF_base) & !is.na(allele) & allele != REF_base
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_type))

panel_pos <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(profile = nm, POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
    distinct()
})

alleles_panel <- alleles_long2 %>%
  inner_join(panel_pos, by = c("profile","POS"))

pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(n_alt = sum(is_alt, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = n_alt, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue = if ("tissue" %in% names(.)) tissue else 0,
    eDNA   = if ("eDNA"   %in% names(.)) eDNA   else 0
  )

pos_support %>% summarise(
  n_positions = n(),
  n_edna_zero = sum(eDNA == 0),
  n_tissue_zero = sum(tissue == 0)
)


```

```{r}

pos_support$profile <- factor(pos_support$profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))

p_support_scatter <- ggplot(pos_support, aes(x = eDNA, y = tissue)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "eDNA SNPs",
    y = "Tissue SNPs",
    subtitle = "each point is a SNP position; points on the diagonal have equal support"
  )

p_support_scatter


```

```{r}

pos_support_pa <- pos_support %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_any = tissue > 0,
    edna_any   = eDNA > 0
  )

p_pa <- ggplot(pos_support_pa, aes(x = edna_any, y = tissue_any)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0.08, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0,1), labels = c("No SNP in eDNA", "SNP in eDNA")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0,1), labels = c("No SNP in tissue", "SNP in tissue")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = NULL,
    title = "Presence/absence of panel SNPs (tissue vs eDNA)"
  )

p_pa

```

```{r}

support_summary <- pos_support %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_panel = n(),
    n_shared = sum(tissue > 0 & eDNA > 0),
    n_tissue_only = sum(tissue > 0 & eDNA == 0),
    prop_shared = n_shared / n_panel,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

support_summary
```

```{r}
pos_support_counts<- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  left_join(bc_type, by = c("profile","barcode"), suffix = c("", "_bc")) %>%
  mutate(sample_type = coalesce(sample_type, sample_type_bc)) %>%
  select(-any_of("sample_type_bc")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, sample_type) %>%
  summarise(n_alt = sum(is_alt, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = n_alt, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue = if ("tissue" %in% names(.)) tissue else 0,
    eDNA   = if ("eDNA" %in% names(.)) eDNA else 0,
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )

ggplot(pos_support_counts, aes(x = eDNA, y = tissue)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.6) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "# eDNA barcodes",
       y = "# tissue barcodes")

```

```{r}
ggplot(pos_support_counts,
       aes(x = eDNA, y = tissue, color = profile)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "ALT support in eDNA (# barcodes)",
    y = "ALT support in tissue (# barcodes)",
    title = "ALT support at panel SNPs: tissue vs eDNA"
  )

```

```{r}
pos_support_counts2 <- pos_support_counts %>%
  mutate(POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(panel_index = row_number()) %>%  
  ungroup()

ggplot(pos_support_counts2,
       aes(x = POS)) +
  geom_segment(aes(y = eDNA, yend = tissue, xend = POS),
               linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(aes(y = tissue), size = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(y = eDNA), size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +

  labs(
    x = "Mitogenome position (bp) of panel SNP",
    y = "ALT-support (# barcodes with ALT at site)",
    title = "Tissue vs eDNA ALT support at each panel SNP (vertical concordance lines)"
  )
```

```{r}

panel_index_tbl <- panel_pos_all %>% 
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

strip_df <- pos_support %>%
  left_join(panel_index_tbl %>% select(profile, POS, snp_index),
            by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(tissue_alt, edna_alt),
    names_to = "sample_type",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = recode(sample_type,
                         tissue_alt = "tissue",
                         edna_alt   = "eDNA"),
    sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA"))
  )

p_snp_strip <- ggplot(strip_df %>% filter(present),
                      aes(x = snp_index, y = sample_type)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index within Tier-3 panel (ordered along mitogenome)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Which panel SNPs show ALT-support in tissue vs eDNA?"
  )

p_snp_strip

```

```{r}
p_snp_strip_all <- ggplot(strip_df,
                          aes(x = snp_index, y = sample_type, alpha = present)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.3) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = 1, `FALSE` = 0.08), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index within Tier-3 panel (ordered along mitogenome)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Tissue vs eDNA presence/absence across panel SNPs"
  )

p_snp_strip_all

```

```{r}

# SNP index per profile
panel_index_tbl <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

# presence/absence per SNP (ALT-support in ANY barcode of that sample type)
pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_present = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_present   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(panel_index_tbl, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_present = as.integer(tissue_present),
    edna_present   = as.integer(edna_present),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )

p_concord <- ggplot(pos_support, aes(x = edna_present, y = tissue_present)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.06, height = 0.06, size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:1, labels = c("Absent","Present"), limits = c(-0.2, 1.2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 0:1, labels = c("Absent","Present"), limits = c(-0.2, 1.2)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "eDNA: ALT-support present?",
    y = "Tissue: ALT-support present?",
    title = "SNP-level concordance (each dot = one panel SNP)"
  )

p_concord



```

```{r}

# 1) SNP index per profile 
panel_index_tbl <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

# does ANY tissue have ALT? does ANY eDNA have ALT?
pos_support <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(panel_index_tbl, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  mutate(
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")),
    shared  = tissue_alt & edna_alt
  )

dots_tissue <- pos_support %>%
  filter(tissue_alt) %>%
  transmute(profile, snp_index, y = 1)

dots_edna <- pos_support %>%
  filter(edna_alt) %>%
  transmute(profile, snp_index, y = 0)

segs_shared <- pos_support %>%
  filter(shared) %>%
  transmute(profile, snp_index, x = snp_index, xend = snp_index, y = 0, yend = 1)

p_two_track <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = segs_shared,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
               linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(data = dots_tissue, aes(x = snp_index, y = y), size = 1.3) +
  geom_point(data = dots_edna,   aes(x = snp_index, y = y), size = 1.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("eDNA", "tissue"), limits = c(-0.3, 1.3)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index within panel (1…N, ordered along mitogenome)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Panel SNP presence in tissue vs eDNA (dots) and shared SNPs (connectors)"
  )

p_two_track

```

```{r}
pos_presence<- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_any = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_any   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")),
    x = as.integer(edna_any),     # 0/1 for plotting
    y = as.integer(tissue_any)    # 0/1 for plotting
  )

p_presence2d <- ggplot(pos_presence, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.06, height = 0.06), alpha = 0.7, size = 1.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("No eDNA", "Any eDNA"), limits = c(-0.2, 1.2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("No tissue", "Any tissue"), limits = c(-0.2, 1.2)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "ALT present in eDNA (any barcode)",
    y = "ALT present in tissue (any barcode)",
  )

p_presence2d


```

```{r}
pos_counts <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_n = n_distinct(barcode[is_alt & sample_type == "tissue"]),
    edna_n   = n_distinct(barcode[is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA"]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

p_counts <- ggplot(pos_counts, aes(x = edna_n, y = tissue_n)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.6) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = 2) +   
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "# eDNA barcodes with ALT (per SNP)",
    y = "# tissue barcodes with ALT (per SNP)",
    title = "ALT support per SNP: tissue vs eDNA (counts)"
  )

p_counts

```

```{r}

bc_type <- master_clean %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_type) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode))

panel_index <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(
      profile = as.character(nm),
      POS     = as.double(POS)
    ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    arrange(POS) %>%
    mutate(snp_index = row_number())
})


  select(-any_of("sample_type")) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  left_join(bc_type, by = c("profile", "barcode")) %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

diag_df <- panel_index %>%
  left_join(pos_support, by = c("profile", "POS")) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_alt = replace_na(tissue_alt, FALSE),
    edna_alt   = replace_na(edna_alt,   FALSE),
    shared     = tissue_alt & edna_alt,
    profile    = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )

p_diag_faceted <- ggplot(diag_df, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  # dots only where SNP is shared (holes = missing dots)
  geom_point(data = ~ dplyr::filter(.x, shared), size = 1.6) +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (panel ordered by position)",
    y = "SNP index (panel ordered by position)",
    title = "Panel SNP sharing: tissue vs eDNA (diagonal with holes = tissue-only SNPs)"
  )

p_diag_faceted


```

```{r}
plot_diag_one <- function(df, prof) {
  df1 <- df %>% filter(profile == prof)
  ggplot(df1, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    geom_point(data = df1 %>% filter(shared), size = 2) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      x = paste0("SNP index (", prof, " panel)"),
      y = paste0("SNP index (", prof, " panel)"),
      title = paste0(prof, ": dots = SNPs with ALT in both tissue & eDNA")
    )
}

p_strict   <- plot_diag_one(diag_df, "strict")
p_moderate <- plot_diag_one(diag_df, "moderate")
p_relaxed  <- plot_diag_one(diag_df, "relaxed")

p_strict
p_moderate
p_relaxed
```

```{r}
panel_index <- panel_pos_all %>%
  dplyr::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(profile = as.character(profile)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(profile) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(POS, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(snp_index = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(profile, POS, snp_index)

pos_support2 <- alleles_panel %>%
  dplyr::mutate(profile = as.character(profile), POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    tissue_alt = any(is_alt & sample_type == "tissue", na.rm = TRUE),
    edna_alt   = any(is_alt & sample_type == "eDNA",   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

diag_df <- panel_index %>%
  dplyr::left_join(pos_support2, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    tissue_alt = tidyr::replace_na(tissue_alt, FALSE),
    edna_alt   = tidyr::replace_na(edna_alt,   FALSE),
    shared     = tissue_alt & edna_alt,
    profile    = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  )

p_diag_faceted <- ggplot(diag_df, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
  geom_blank() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  geom_point(data = ~ dplyr::filter(.x, shared), size = 1.6) +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (panel ordered by position)",
    y = "SNP index (panel ordered by position)",
    title = "Panel SNP sharing: tissue vs eDNA (diagonal with holes)"
  )
```

```{r}

diag_strict   <- dplyr::filter(diag_df, profile == "strict")
diag_moderate <- dplyr::filter(diag_df, profile == "moderate")
diag_relaxed  <- dplyr::filter(diag_df, profile == "relaxed")

plot_diag <- function(df, title_text) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
    geom_blank() +   
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    geom_point(data = dplyr::filter(df, shared), size = 1.6) +
    coord_equal() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      x = "SNP index (panel order)",
      y = "SNP index (panel order)",
      title = title_text
    )
}
p_strict   <- plot_diag(diag_strict,   "Strict panel (146 SNPs)")
p_moderate <- plot_diag(diag_moderate, "Moderate panel (288 SNPs)")
p_relaxed  <- plot_diag(diag_relaxed,  "Relaxed panel (453 SNPs)")
```

```{r}
allele_summary <- alleles_panel %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, sample_type, allele) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, sample_type) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

allele_wide <- allele_summary %>%
  select(profile, POS, sample_type, allele) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = allele)

allele_wide <- allele_wide %>%
  mutate(match = tissue == eDNA)

diag_df <- allele_wide %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()
ggplot(diag_df, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  geom_point(data = subset(diag_df, match), size = 1.6) +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile)   

table(allele_wide$profile, allele_wide$match)
```

```{r}

pairs <- master_clean %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  transmute(profile = as.character(profile),
            edna_barcode = as.character(barcode),
            tissue_barcode = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  # keep only pairs where tissue barcode exists as tissue
  inner_join(
    master_clean %>%
      filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
      transmute(profile = as.character(profile),
                tissue_barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")
  )

pair_alleles <- pairs %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_panel %>%
      mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
             edna_barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
      select(profile, edna_barcode, POS, allele_edna = allele),
    by = c("profile","edna_barcode")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_panel %>%
      mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
             tissue_barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
      select(profile, tissue_barcode, POS, allele_tissue = allele),
    by = c("profile","tissue_barcode","POS")
  )

pair_alleles2 <- pair_alleles %>%
  mutate(
    allele_edna   = na_if(allele_edna, "N"),
    allele_tissue = na_if(allele_tissue, "N"),
    both_called = !is.na(allele_edna) & !is.na(allele_tissue),
    match = both_called & (allele_edna == allele_tissue)
  )

per_snp_agree <- pair_alleles2 %>%
  group_by(profile, POS) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n_distinct(paste(edna_barcode, tissue_barcode, sep="__")),
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    agree_rate = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

diag_df2 <- per_snp_agree %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number(),
         shared = !is.na(agree_rate) & agree_rate >= 0.8) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_diag_one2 <- function(df, prof) {
  d <- df %>% filter(profile == prof)
  ggplot(d, aes(snp_index, snp_index)) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    geom_point(data = subset(d, shared), size = 1.6) +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(1, max(d$snp_index)), ylim = c(1, max(d$snp_index))) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(prof, " panel (", max(d$snp_index), " SNPs)"),
      subtitle = "Dots = SNPs with ≥80% allele agreement across paired eDNA–tissue (among callable pairs)",
      x = "SNP index (panel order)",
      y = "SNP index (panel order)"
    )
}

p_strict2   <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "strict")
p_moderate2 <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "moderate")
p_relaxed2  <- plot_diag_one2(diag_df2, "relaxed")


p_strict2
```

```{r}
per_snp_agree %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_snps = n(),
    mean_called = mean(n_called > 0, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_agree = mean(agree_rate, na.rm=TRUE),
    prop_perfect = mean(agree_rate == 1, na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups="drop"
  )

```

```{r}

pair_level <- pair_alleles2 %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, tissue_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(both_called, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_match  = sum(match, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pair_level %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pair_match = mean(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_pair_match = median(prop_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}

ggplot(pair_level, aes(x = profile, y = prop_match)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    y = "Proportion of matching genotypes per paired sample",
    x = "Filtering profile"
  )


```

```{r}

diag_df <- allele_wide %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      is.na(eDNA) ~ "No eDNA call",           # blank
      is.na(tissue) ~ "No tissue call",       
      eDNA == tissue ~ "Match",               
      TRUE ~ "Mismatch"                       
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  arrange(POS) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

p_line <- ggplot(diag_df, aes(x = snp_index, y = 1)) +

  geom_line(aes(group = 1), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +

  # matches (green)
  geom_point(
    data = subset(diag_df, status == "Match"),
    color = "forestgreen",
    size = 2
  ) +

  # mismatches (red)
  geom_point(
    data = subset(diag_df, status == "Mismatch"),
    color = "red3",
    size = 2
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +

  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (panel order)",
    subtitle = "Green = matching allele | Red = mismatching allele | Blank = no eDNA call"
  )

p_line
```

```{r}

names(pairs_valid2)

pairs_edna <- pairs_valid2 %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
         barcode = as.character(barcode),
         sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  left_join(
    bc_type %>%
      transmute(profile = as.character(profile),
                barcode = as.character(barcode),
                sample_type = as.character(sample_type)),
    by = c("profile","barcode")
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  distinct(profile,
           edna_barcode   = barcode,
           tissue_barcode = sample_pair)

alleles_min <- alleles_panel %>%
  transmute(profile = as.character(profile),
            barcode = as.character(barcode),
            POS = as.double(POS),
            allele = as.character(allele))

pair_snp_long <- pairs_edna %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_min %>%
      rename(edna_barcode = barcode, allele_edna = allele),
    by = c("profile", "edna_barcode")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    alleles_min %>%
      rename(tissue_barcode = barcode, allele_tissue = allele),
    by = c("profile", "tissue_barcode", "POS")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    status_pair = case_when(
      is.na(allele_edna)   ~ "No eDNA call",     
      is.na(allele_tissue) ~ "No tissue call",   
      allele_edna == allele_tissue ~ "Match",
      TRUE ~ "Mismatch"
    )
  )



```

```{r}
head(pairs_valid2)
head(alleles_panel)
head(qc_wide)
names(profile_results)
```

```{r}

type_map <- qc_wide %>%
  select(barcode, sample_type) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_typed <- pairs_valid2 %>%
  left_join(type_map, by = "barcode") %>%
  rename(sample_type_barcode = sample_type) %>%
  left_join(type_map, by = c("sample_pair" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(sample_type_pair = sample_type)

# enforce tissue as the anchor (so each pair appears once)
pairs_tbl <- pairs_typed %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_barcode = case_when(
      sample_type_barcode == "tissue" ~ barcode,
      sample_type_pair    == "tissue" ~ sample_pair,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    edna_barcode = case_when(
      sample_type_barcode == "eDNA" ~ barcode,
      sample_type_pair    == "eDNA" ~ sample_pair,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_barcode), !is.na(edna_barcode)) %>%
  transmute(profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_tbl %>% count(profile)
pairs_typed %>% count(profile, sample_type_barcode, sample_type_pair)

```

```{r}
type_map <- alleles_panel %>%
  select(barcode, sample_type) %>%
  distinct()

tissue_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  select(profile, tissue_barcode = barcode, POS, tissue_allele = allele)

edna_calls <- alleles_panel %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  select(profile, edna_barcode = barcode, POS, edna_allele = allele)

concordance <- pairs_tbl %>%
  left_join(tissue_calls, by = c("profile","tissue_barcode")) %>%
  left_join(edna_calls,   by = c("profile","edna_barcode","POS")) %>%
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      is.na(edna_allele) ~ "no eDNA call",
      edna_allele == tissue_allele ~ "match",
      TRUE ~ "mismatch"
    ),
    pair_id = paste(tissue_barcode, "vs", edna_barcode)
  )
```

```{r}
concordance_plot <- concordance %>%
  mutate(pair_id = factor(pair_id, levels = rev(sort(unique(pair_id)))))

ggplot(concordance_plot, aes(x = POS, y = pair_id, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("match" = "green3", "mismatch" = "red3", "no eDNA call" = NA),
    na.value = "white"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7)
  ) +
  labs(x = "SNP position", y = "Tissue vs eDNA pair", fill = NULL)
```

```{r}
pair_summary <- concordance %>%
  group_by(profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sites = sum(!is.na(tissue_allele)),                 # tissue callable sites
    n_edna_called = sum(!is.na(edna_allele)),
    n_match = sum(status == "match", na.rm = TRUE),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch", na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_match = ifelse(n_edna_called > 0, n_match / n_edna_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(pair_summary, aes(x = tissue_barcode, y = edna_barcode, fill = pct_match)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(x = "Tissue barcode", y = "eDNA barcode", fill = "% match")
```

```{r}
pair_summary2 <- pair_summary %>%
  mutate(
    pair_label = paste(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode, sep = " ↔ "),
    class = case_when(
      is.na(pct_match) ~ "no eDNA call",
      pct_match == 1 ~ "perfect",
      pct_match >= 0.95 ~ "high",
      TRUE ~ "lower"
    )
  )

line_df <- pair_summary2 %>%
  select(profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode, pair_label, pct_match, class) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(tissue_barcode, edna_barcode),
    names_to = "side",
    values_to = "barcode"
  ) %>%
  mutate(side = recode(side, tissue_barcode = "tissue", edna_barcode = "eDNA"))

ggplot(line_df, aes(x = side, y = pair_label, group = pair_label)) +
  geom_line(aes(color = class)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = class), size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = NULL)
```

```{r}

panel_index <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

diag_df <- concordance %>%
  left_join(panel_index, by = c("profile", "POS"))

ggplot(
  diag_df %>% filter(status != "no eDNA call"),
  aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index, color = status)
) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("match" = "green3", "mismatch" = "red3")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "SNP index (panel order)", y = "SNP index (panel order)", color = NULL)

```

```{r}
per_snp <- diag_df %>%
  group_by(profile, POS, snp_index) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    n_called = sum(status != "no eDNA call"),
    n_match  = sum(status == "match"),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch"),
    frac_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(per_snp, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = frac_match), size = 1, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (panel order)",
    y = "SNP index (panel order)",
    alpha = "Fraction match"
  )
```

```{r}
panel_index <- alleles_panel %>%
  distinct(profile, POS) %>%
  arrange(profile, POS) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  mutate(snp_index = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

conc_plot <- concordance %>%
  left_join(panel_index, by = c("profile", "POS"))


ggplot(conc_plot, aes(x = snp_index, y = pair_id, fill = status)) +
  geom_tile(height = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("match" = "green3", "mismatch" = "red3", "no eDNA call" = "white")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
  ) +
  labs(x = "SNP index (panel order)", y = "Tissue ↔ eDNA pair", fill = NULL)
```

```{r}
per_snp <- conc_plot %>%
  group_by(profile, snp_index) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(status != "no eDNA call"),
    n_match  = sum(status == "match"),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch"),
    frac_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(per_snp, aes(x = snp_index, y = snp_index, color = frac_match)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) +
  labs(
    x = "SNP index (panel order)",
    y = "SNP index (panel order)",
    color = "Fraction match"
  )
```

```{r}
## explorations
pair_scores <- concordance %>%
  group_by(profile, pair_id, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    n_called = sum(status != "no eDNA call"),
    n_match  = sum(status == "match"),
    n_mismatch = sum(status == "mismatch"),
    pct_match = ifelse(n_called > 0, n_match / n_called, NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pair_scores %>%
  arrange(profile, desc(pct_match))

write.csv(pair_scores, "scores.csv")
```

```{r}
hg_lut <- paired_dist %>%
  select(barcode, haplogroup, haplotype) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_one <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_barcode = if_else(sample_type == "tissue", barcode, sample_pair),
    edna_barcode   = if_else(sample_type == "edna",   barcode, sample_pair)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_barcode), !is.na(edna_barcode)) %>%
  transmute(
    profile, tissue_barcode, edna_barcode,
    n_panel_sites, n_alt_sites, marver_conc_eDNA  
  ) %>%
  distinct()

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("tissue_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(tissue_haplogroup = haplogroup, tissue_haplotype = haplotype) %>%
  left_join(hg_lut, by = c("edna_barcode" = "barcode")) %>%
  rename(edna_haplogroup = haplogroup, edna_haplotype = haplotype)

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  mutate(same_haplogroup = tissue_haplogroup == edna_haplogroup)

pairs_one <- pairs_one %>%
  mutate(concord = 1 - (n_alt_sites / n_panel_sites))

ggplot(pairs_one, aes(x = same_haplogroup, y = concord)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Same haplogroup?", y = "Concordance")
```

```{r}
  left_join(edna_calls,   by = c("profile","edna_barcode","POS")) %>% 
  mutate(
    status = case_when(
      is.na(edna_allele) ~ "no eDNA call",
      edna_allele == tissue_allele ~ "match",
      TRUE ~ "mismatch"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(panel_index, by = c("profile","POS"))

conc_plot %>% count(profile, status)
conc_plot %>% summarise(any_na_index = any(is.na(snp_index)))
```

```{r}

master2 <- master %>%
  mutate(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    profile = as.character(profile),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA"),
    sample_type = as.character(sample_type)
  )

paired_valid <- master2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  inner_join(
    master2 %>% select(profile, barcode) %>% distinct(),
    by = c("profile", "sample_pair" = "barcode")
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair, .keep_all = TRUE)

paired_valid %>% count(profile)

mode_base <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  tab <- table(x)
  names(tab)[which.max(tab)]
}

get_hapmat_matrix <- function(hapmat) {
  df <- as.data.frame(hapmat)
  stopifnot("barcode" %in% names(df))
  rownames(df) <- df$barcode
  df$barcode <- NULL
  m <- as.matrix(df)
  storage.mode(m) <- "character"
  m
}

get_ref_vector_from_hapmat <- function(m) {
  apply(m, 2, mode_base)
}
hap_objects <- imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  m <- get_hapmat_matrix(res$hapmat)
  ref <- get_ref_vector_from_hapmat(m)
  list(profile = nm, m = m, ref = ref)
})


pair_prop_mismatch <- function(m, bcA, bcB) {
  a <- m[bcA, ]
  b <- m[bcB, ]
  comparable <- !is.na(a) & !is.na(b)
  if (sum(comparable) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  mean(a[comparable] != b[comparable])
}
pair_alt_recall <- function(m, ref, edna_bc, tissue_bc) {
  e <- m[edna_bc, ]
  t <- m[tissue_bc, ]

  # ALT relative to reference vector
  t_alt <- !is.na(t) & (t != ref)
  e_alt <- !is.na(e) & (e != ref)

  denom <- sum(t_alt)
  if (denom == 0) return(NA_real_)
  sum(t_alt & e_alt) / denom
}

pair_alt_jaccard <- function(m, ref, edna_bc, tissue_bc) {
  e <- m[edna_bc, ]
  t <- m[tissue_bc, ]

  e_alt <- !is.na(e) & (e != ref)
  t_alt <- !is.na(t) & (t != ref)

  inter <- sum(e_alt & t_alt)
  uni   <- sum(e_alt | t_alt)
  if (uni == 0) return(NA_real_)
  inter / uni
}

pair_mismatch_on_tissue_alt <- function(m, ref, edna_bc, tissue_bc) {
  e <- m[edna_bc, ]
  t <- m[tissue_bc, ]

  t_alt <- !is.na(t) & (t != ref)
  if (sum(t_alt) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  # compare only at tissue-ALT sites where eDNA has a call (not NA)
  comparable <- t_alt & !is.na(e)
  if (sum(comparable) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  mean(e[comparable] != t[comparable])
}

paired_metrics <- paired_valid %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile)) %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(\(df, key) {
    nm <- key$profile
    ho <- hap_objects[[nm]]
    m <- ho$m
    ref <- ho$ref

    df %>%
      mutate(
        prop_mismatch_callable = map2_dbl(barcode, sample_pair, ~ pair_prop_mismatch(m, .x, .y)),
        alt_recall_tissue      = map2_dbl(barcode, sample_pair, ~ pair_alt_recall(m, ref, .x, .y)),
        alt_jaccard            = map2_dbl(barcode, sample_pair, ~ pair_alt_jaccard(m, ref, .x, .y)),
        mismatch_on_tissue_alt = map2_dbl(barcode, sample_pair, ~ pair_mismatch_on_tissue_alt(m, ref, .x, .y))
      )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

paired_metrics %>% select(profile, barcode, sample_pair,
                          prop_mismatch_callable, alt_recall_tissue,
                          alt_jaccard, mismatch_on_tissue_alt) %>% head()



```

```{r}
pm_long <- paired_metrics %>%
  select(profile, prop_mismatch_callable, alt_recall_tissue, alt_jaccard, mismatch_on_tissue_alt) %>%
  pivot_longer(-profile, names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(metric = recode(metric,
                         prop_mismatch_callable = "Mismatch proportion (callable sites)",
                         alt_recall_tissue      = "ALT recall vs tissue",
                         alt_jaccard            = "ALT Jaccard (eDNA vs tissue)",
                         mismatch_on_tissue_alt = "Mismatch proportion (tissue-ALT sites)"))

ggplot(pm_long, aes(x = profile, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.35) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Profile", y = NULL,
       title = "Paired eDNA↔tissue concordance using alternative distance metrics")

```

```{r}
ggplot(paired_metrics,
       aes(x = alt_recall_tissue, y = prop_mismatch_callable)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "ALT recall vs tissue (0–1)",
       y = "Mismatch proportion on callable sites (0–1)",
       title = "Pairs: recovery vs disagreement (should separate 'sparse recovery' from true discordance)")


```

```{r}
set.seed(1)
n_perm <- 10000

perm_test_profile <- function(df, metric_col = "prop_mismatch_callable") {
  edna <- df$barcode
  tissue_pool <- df$sample_pair
  obs <- mean(df[[metric_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

  perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
    rand_tissue <- sample(tissue_pool, length(edna), replace = FALSE)
    mean(map2_dbl(edna, rand_tissue, \(a,b) df[[metric_col]][match(a, df$barcode)] ), na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  tibble(
    obs = obs,
    p_one_sided = mean(perm_means <= obs) 
  )
}

paired_metrics %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    obs_mean = mean(prop_mismatch_callable, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

```

```{r}

perm_test_pairs <- function(pairs_df,
                            meta_df,
                            metric = c("prop_mismatch_callable",
                                       "alt_jaccard",
                                       "alt_recall_tissue",
                                       "mismatch_on_tissue_alt"),
                            n_perm = 10000,
                            seed = 123) {

  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  metric_to_distance <- function(df) {
    if (metric == "alt_jaccard") {
      df %>% mutate(dist = 1 - alt_jaccard)
    } else if (metric == "alt_recall_tissue") {
      df %>% mutate(dist = 1 - alt_recall_tissue)
    } else {
      df %>% mutate(dist = .data[[metric]])
    }
  }

  set.seed(seed)
  pairs_use <- pairs_df %>%
    mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
           barcode = as.character(barcode),
           sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
    { if ("sample_type" %in% names(.)) filter(., sample_type == "eDNA") else . } %>%
    metric_to_distance() %>%
    filter(!is.na(dist))

    tissue_pool <- meta_df %>%
    mutate(profile = as.character(profile),
           barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
    filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
    distinct(profile, barcode)

  out <- pairs_use %>%
    group_by(profile) %>%
    group_modify(~{
      dat <- .x
      prof <- unique(dat$profile)

      eDNA_bcs   <- dat$barcode
      n_pairs    <- length(eDNA_bcs)

      pool_t <- tissue_pool %>%
        filter(profile == prof) %>%
        pull(barcode) %>%
        unique()

      if (length(pool_t) == 0) {
        return(tibble(
          n_pairs = n_pairs,
          obs_mean = mean(dat$dist),
          p_value = NA_real_
        ))
      }

      # observed mean distance for TRUE pairs
      obs_mean <- mean(dat$dist)

      # null: randomly pair eDNA barcodes with tissue barcodes
      replace_t <- length(pool_t) < n_pairs

      perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
        rand_t <- sample(pool_t, n_pairs, replace = replace_t)
        NA_real_
      })

      tibble(
        n_pairs   = n_pairs,
        obs_mean  = obs_mean,
        p_value   = NA_real_
      )
    }) %>%
    ungroup()

  out
}


compute_mismatch_prop_matrix <- function(hapmat,
                                         missing = c("N", "-", "n", "?", NA)) {
  hm <- as.data.frame(hapmat)

  if (!("barcode" %in% names(hm))) {
    hm <- hm %>% rownames_to_column("barcode")
  }

  barcodes <- hm$barcode
  X <- hm %>% select(-barcode) %>% as.matrix()

  is_missing <- function(v) v %in% missing | is.na(v)

  n <- nrow(X)
  out <- matrix(NA_real_, n, n, dimnames = list(barcodes, barcodes))

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    for (j in i:n) {
      xi <- X[i, ]
      xj <- X[j, ]

      callable <- !(is_missing(xi) | is_missing(xj))
      denom <- sum(callable)

      if (denom == 0) {
        d <- NA_real_
      } else {
        d <- sum(xi[callable] != xj[callable]) / denom
      }

      out[i, j] <- d
      out[j, i] <- d
    }
  }
  out
}


perm_test_with_distmat <- function(pairs_df,
                                   dist_mat,
                                   n_perm = 10000,
                                   seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)

  dat <- pairs_df %>%
    mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode),
           sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
    { if ("sample_type" %in% names(.)) filter(., sample_type == "eDNA") else . }

  # keep only pairs where both barcodes exist in dist matrix
  ok <- dat$barcode %in% rownames(dist_mat) & dat$sample_pair %in% colnames(dist_mat)
  dat <- dat[ok, , drop = FALSE]

  eDNA_bcs <- dat$barcode
  true_t   <- dat$sample_pair
  n_pairs  <- nrow(dat)

  # observed mean distance for true pairs
  obs <- map2_dbl(eDNA_bcs, true_t, ~ dist_mat[.x, .y])
  obs_mean <- mean(obs, na.rm = TRUE)

  # pools
  tissue_pool <- unique(true_t)  
  replace_t <- length(tissue_pool) < n_pairs

  perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
    rand_t <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = replace_t)
    d <- map2_dbl(eDNA_bcs, rand_t, ~ dist_mat[.x, .y])
    mean(d, na.rm = TRUE)
  })

  p <- mean(perm_means <= obs_mean)

  list(
    n_pairs = n_pairs,
    obs_mean = obs_mean,
    perm_means = perm_means,
    p_value = p
  )
}

#build a mismatch-proportion distance matrix per profile from hapmat
dist_mats <- purrr::imap(profile_results, ~ compute_mismatch_prop_matrix(.x$hapmat))

# split  paired table by profile and run
results_perm <- purrr::imap_dfr(dist_mats, \(dm, prof) {
  res <- perm_test_with_distmat(
    pairs_df = paired_valid_edna %>% filter(profile == prof),
    dist_mat = dm,
    n_perm = 10000,
    seed = 123
  )
  tibble(profile = prof, n_pairs = res$n_pairs, obs_mean = res$obs_mean, p_value = res$p_value)
})

results_perm



```

```{r}

plot_perm <- function(perm_obj, title = "") {
  df <- tibble(x = perm_obj$perm_means)
  ggplot(df, aes(x = x)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = perm_obj$obs_mean, linewidth = 1) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(x = "Mean mismatch proportion (random pairing)",
         y = "Count",
         title = title)
}
```

```{r}
paired_tbl <- master_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair, sample_type, haplogroup, haplotype) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  inner_join(
    master_clean %>%
      distinct(profile, barcode, haplogroup, haplotype, sample_type) %>%
      rename(sample_pair = barcode,
             tissue_haplogroup = haplogroup,
             tissue_haplotype  = haplotype,
             tissue_type       = sample_type),
    by = c("profile","sample_pair")
  ) %>%
  filter(tissue_type == "tissue") %>%
  mutate(
    haplogroup_match = haplogroup == tissue_haplogroup,
    haplotype_match  = haplotype  == tissue_haplotype
  )

  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    haplogroup_match_rate = mean(haplogroup_match, na.rm=TRUE),
    haplotype_match_rate  = mean(haplotype_match,  na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups="drop"
  )
```
