```{r}
pairs_valid <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile)) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  left_join(
    master_clean %>%
      filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
      distinct(profile = as.character(profile),
               barcode,
               tissue_haplogroup = haplogroup,
               tissue_haplotype  = haplotype),
    by = c("profile", "sample_pair" = "barcode")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(tissue_haplogroup))

pairs_valid2 <- pairs_valid %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  mutate(profile = as.character(profile))

pairs_valid %>%
  count(profile, barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

alt_sets2 <- alt_sets2 %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, CHROM, POS)

overlap_tbl <- alt_sets2 %>%
  rename(sample_pair = barcode) %>%
  inner_join(
    alt_sets2 %>% rename(edna_barcode = barcode),
    by = c("profile","CHROM","POS")
  ) %>%
  count(profile, edna_barcode, sample_pair, name = "alt_overlap") %>%
  distinct(profile, edna_barcode, sample_pair, .keep_all = TRUE)

overlap_tbl %>% count(profile, edna_barcode, sample_pair) %>% filter(n > 1)

pair_alt_metrics <- pairs_valid2 %>%
  transmute(profile,
            edna_barcode = barcode,
            sample_pair) %>%

  left_join(
    alt_sets2 %>%
      count(profile, barcode, name = "tissue_alt_n") %>%
      rename(sample_pair = barcode),
    by = c("profile","sample_pair")
  ) %>%

  left_join(
    alt_sets2 %>%
      count(profile, barcode, name = "edna_alt_n") %>%
      rename(edna_barcode = barcode),
    by = c("profile","edna_barcode")
  ) %>%

  left_join(
    overlap_tbl,
    by = c("profile","edna_barcode","sample_pair")
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    tissue_alt_n = tidyr::replace_na(tissue_alt_n, 0L),
    edna_alt_n   = tidyr::replace_na(edna_alt_n,   0L),
    alt_overlap  = tidyr::replace_na(alt_overlap,  0L),
    alt_recall_tissue = dplyr::if_else(tissue_alt_n > 0, alt_overlap / tissue_alt_n, NA_real_)
  )



```

```{r}

names(paired_dist)[grepl("mismatch|recall|jacc|agree|dist", names(paired_dist), ignore.case = TRUE)]

alt_set2 <- alleles_panel %>%
  mutate(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    POS = as.double(POS)
  ) %>%
  filter(is_alt, !is.na(allele)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, POS)

pairs_valid <- master_clean %>%
  mutate(
    profile     = as.character(profile),
    barcode     = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  distinct(profile, barcode, sample_pair)

alt_jaccard <- function(profile, edna_bc, tissue_bc, alt_sets2) {
  a <- alt_sets2 %>% filter(profile == !!profile, barcode == !!edna_bc)   %>% pull(POS)
  b <- alt_sets2 %>% filter(profile == !!profile, barcode == !!tissue_bc) %>% pull(POS)

  if (length(a) == 0 && length(b) == 0) return(0)
  if (length(a) == 0 || length(b) == 0) return(1)

  1 - (length(intersect(a, b)) / length(union(a, b)))
}

set.seed(123)
n_perm <- 10000

perm_means_alt <- pairs_valid %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    prof <- .y$profile
    df   <- .x
    n_pairs <- nrow(df)

    tissue_pool <- unique(df$sample_pair)

    # observed mean distance for the TRUE pairs
    obs <- mean(map2_dbl(df$barcode, df$sample_pair,
                         ~ alt_jaccard(prof, .x, .y, alt_sets2)))

    # null: random tissue partner for each eDNA (within profile)
    perm_means <- replicate(n_perm, {
      rand_tissue <- sample(tissue_pool, n_pairs, replace = TRUE)
      mean(map2_dbl(df$barcode, rand_tissue,
                    ~ alt_jaccard(prof, .x, .y, alt_sets2)))
    })

    tibble(obs_mean = obs, perm_mean = perm_means)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

results_perm <- perm_means_alt %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    obs_mean = first(obs_mean),
    p_value  = mean(perm_mean <= obs_mean),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

results_perm

```


```{r}

pair_mismatch <- pairs_valid2 %>%
  transmute(
    profile = as.character(profile),
    edna_barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair  = as.character(sample_pair)
  ) %>%
  # attach all callable alleles for the eDNA barcode 
  inner_join(
    alleles_panel %>%
      rename(edna_barcode = barcode, allele_edna = allele),
    by = c("profile","edna_barcode")
  ) %>%
  # attach callable alleles for the tissue barcode at the same POS
  inner_join(
    alleles_panel %>%
      rename(sample_pair = barcode, allele_tissue = allele),
    by = c("profile","sample_pair","POS")
  ) %>%
  mutate(mismatch = allele_edna != allele_tissue) %>%
  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  summarise(
    n_callable_shared = n(),
    n_mismatch = sum(mismatch, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_mismatch_callable = n_mismatch / n_callable_shared,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary(pair_mismatch$prop_mismatch_callable)
pair_mismatch %>% arrange(desc(prop_mismatch_callable)) %>% head(10)
pair_mismatch %>% arrange(prop_mismatch_callable) %>% head(10)



```

```{r}
    profile = as.character(profile),
    edna_barcode = as.character(barcode),

    alleles_call10 %>%

  group_by(profile, edna_barcode, sample_pair) %>%
  summarise(
    n_callable_shared = n(),
    n_mismatch = sum(mismatch, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_mismatch_callable = n_mismatch / n_callable_shared,
    .groups = "drop"

summary(pair_mismatch$prop_mismatch_callable)
```

```{r}

compute_dist_matrix <- function(hapmat) {

  hm <- as.data.frame(hapmat)

    if (!("barcode" %in% names(hm))) {
    rn <- rownames(hm)
    if (!is.null(rn) && any(grepl("^barcode", rn))) {
      hm <- hm %>% rownames_to_column("barcode")
    } else {
      names(hm)[1] <- "barcode"
    }
  }

  dna <- hm %>%
    dplyr::select(-barcode) %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    as.DNAbin()

  rownames(dna) <- hm$barcode

  d <- ape::dist.dna(dna, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)
  as.matrix(d)
}

dist_list <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  list(
    profile = nm,
    dist = compute_dist_matrix(res$hapmat)
  )
})

names(profile_results$strict$hapmat)
head(profile_results$strict$hapmat[, 1:5])

n_sites <- ncol(as.data.frame(profile_results$strict$hapmat)) - 1  
dist_counts <- dist_list$strict$dist * n_sites

```

```{r}
dist_counts_list <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  hapmat <- as.data.frame(res$hapmat)
  n_sites <- ncol(hapmat) - 1
  d_prop  <- dist_list[[nm]]$dist
  d_prop * n_sites
})
safe_lookup <- function(dmat, a, b) {
  a <- as.character(a); b <- as.character(b)
  if (!a %in% rownames(dmat)) return(NA_real_)
  if (!b %in% colnames(dmat)) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(dmat[a, b])
}

paired_dist <- paired_valid %>%
  mutate(
    snp_distance = purrr::pmap_dbl(
      list(profile, barcode, sample_pair),
      \(profile, barcode, sample_pair) {
        dmat <- dist_counts_list[[as.character(profile)]]
        safe_lookup(dmat, barcode, sample_pair)
      }
    )
  )

paired_dist %>%
  filter(is.na(snp_distance)) %>%
  count(profile)

paired_dist_edna <- paired_dist %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(snp_distance))

ggplot(paired_dist_edna, aes(x = snp_distance)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "SNP differences (eDNA vs paired tissue)",
       y = "Number of pairs")
```

```{r}
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
```

```{r}
prof_levels <- c("strict","moderate","relaxed")

# panel positions
panel_pos_all <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(profile = nm, POS = as.double(POS))
}) %>% mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = prof_levels))

# ALT-present events at panel sites, split by sample_type
alt_support_by_pos <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {

  vaf_low   <- res$params$vaf_low
  min_alt_hi <- res$params$min_alt_hi

  res$snps %>%
    mutate(profile = nm,
           POS = as.double(POS),
           pass_alt = !is.na(vaf) & vaf >= vaf_low & alt_count >= min_alt_hi) %>%
    filter(pass_alt) %>%                       # only high-confidence ALT
    semi_join(panel_pos_all %>% filter(profile == nm),
              by = c("profile","POS")) %>%     # only Tier-3 panel positions
    distinct(profile, POS, barcode, sample_type) %>%  # barcode counted once per site
    mutate(sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")))
}) %>% mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = prof_levels))

alt_pos_counts <- alt_support_by_pos %>%
  count(profile, sample_type, POS, name = "n_alt_barcodes")

p_panel_dist_split <- ggplot(alt_pos_counts, aes(x = POS, weight = n_alt_barcodes, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, position = "identity", alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position (bp)",
       y = "ALT-support (sum of barcodes with ALT at site)",
       fill = "Sample type",
       title = "Panel SNP positions split by tissue vs eDNA (ALT-support at Tier-3 panel sites)")
p_panel_dist_split


```

```{r}

cluster_haplogroups_cap <- function(h_obj, target_max = 20) {
  d  <- ape::dist.dna(h_obj, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)
  hc <- hclust(d, method = "average")

  grid <- seq(0.001, 0.1, by = 0.001)
  n_groups <- sapply(grid, \(h) length(unique(cutree(hc, h = h))))

  idx <- which(n_groups <= target_max)[1]
  if (is.na(idx)) idx <- length(grid)

  grp <- cutree(hc, h = grid[idx])

  tibble(
    haplotype = names(grp),
    haplogroup_cap = paste0("HG", grp)
  )
}

edna_capture_cap <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {

  purrr::map_dfr(caps, \(cap) {

    hg_map <- cluster_haplogroups_cap(obj$h, target_max = cap)

    barcode_hg <- hap_membership_hg %>%
      dplyr::filter(profile == nm) %>%
      dplyr::left_join(hg_map, by = "haplotype")
    hg_flags <- barcode_hg %>%
      dplyr::group_by(haplogroup_cap) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    # capture efficiency among eDNA
    edna_capture <- barcode_hg %>%
      dplyr::filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
      dplyr::left_join(hg_flags, by = "haplogroup_cap") %>%
      dplyr::summarise(prop = mean(has_tissue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      dplyr::pull(prop)

    tibble(profile = nm, cap = cap, prop_edna_in_tissue_hg = edna_capture)
  })
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = prof_levels))
p_capture_vs_cap <- ggplot(edna_capture_cap,
                           aes(x = cap, y = prop_edna_in_tissue_hg)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Haplogroup cap (max groups)",
       y = "Proportion of eDNA in tissue-containing haplogroups",
       title = "eDNA capture efficiency vs haplogroup cap")

p_capture_vs_cap


```

## if X haplogroups are allowed - what fraction of eDNA samples assign to tissue haplogroups -\> overfragmenting haplotype can create eDNA singletons, moderate and relaxed profiles produce "stable" structure (haplotypes)

```{r}
qc0 <- qc_current %>%
  mutate(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA")
  )

master <- hap_membership_hg %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode),
         profile = as.character(profile)) %>%
  left_join(qc0, by = "barcode")
paired_comp <- paired_calls %>%
  rename(
    barcode_A = barcode,
    barcode_B = sample_pair,
    haplotype_A = haplotype,
    haplogroup_A = haplogroup,
    type_A = sample_type
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    paired_calls %>%
      select(profile, barcode, haplotype, haplogroup, sample_type) %>%
      rename(
        barcode_B = barcode,
        haplotype_B = haplotype,
        haplogroup_B = haplogroup,
        type_B = sample_type
      ),
    by = c("profile", "barcode_B")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    haplotype_match = !is.na(haplotype_B) & haplotype_A == haplotype_B,
    haplogroup_match = !is.na(haplogroup_B) & haplogroup_A == haplogroup_B
  )

paired_comp %>% count(profile, haplotype_match, haplogroup_match)

```

```{r}
hap_wide <- hap_membership_hg %>%
  select(barcode, profile, haplotype, haplogroup) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = profile,
    values_from = c(haplotype, haplogroup),

qc_wide <- qc_current %>%
  distinct(barcode, .keep_all = TRUE)

qc_plus_haps <- qc_wide %>%
  left_join(hap_wide, by = "barcode")

qc_long <- qc_current %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^filtered_snps_(strict|moderate|relaxed)$"),
    names_to = "profile_tmp",
    values_to = "filtered_snps"
  ) %>%
  mutate(profile = sub("^filtered_snps_", "", profile_tmp)) %>%
  select(-profile_tmp)

count(qc_long, profile)
nrow(qc_long)

qc_current %>%
  count(barcode) %>%
  count(n)
```

```{r}
master_clean <- master %>%
   mutate(
     barcode     = as.character(barcode),
     profile     = as.character(profile),
     sample_pair = na_if(as.character(sample_pair), "NA"),
     sample_type = case_when(
       str_to_lower(sample_type) %in% c("edna","e dna","e_dna") ~ "eDNA",
       str_to_lower(sample_type) %in% c("tissue") ~ "tissue",
       TRUE ~ sample_type
     )
   ) %>%
   select(-any_of("X")) %>%
   relocate(barcode, profile, sample_type, sample_pair, haplotype, haplogroup)
```


```{r}
master <- master %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

tier1_thresh <- tibble(
  profile = factor(c("strict","moderate","relaxed"), levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")),
  tier1_min_reads = c(1000, 500, 250)
)


```

```{r}
paired_comp <- master %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  left_join(
    master %>%
      select(profile, barcode, haplogroup, haplotype) %>%
      rename(
        partner_barcode = barcode,
        haplogroup_B = haplogroup,
        haplotype_B  = haplotype
      ),
    by = c("profile", "sample_pair" = "partner_barcode")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    haplogroup_match = !is.na(haplogroup_B) & haplogroup == haplogroup_B,
    haplotype_match  = !is.na(haplotype_B)  & haplotype  == haplotype_B
  )

master <- master %>%
  left_join(
    paired_comp %>% select(profile, barcode, haplogroup_match, haplotype_match),
    by = c("profile","barcode")
  )

paired_comp %>% count(profile, haplogroup_match)
```

```{r}
cascade_df <- master %>%
  left_join(tier1_thresh, by = "profile") %>%
  mutate(
    pass_tier1   = mapped_primary_reads >= tier1_min_reads,
    has_breadth  = breadth_10x >= 0.5,  
    has_signal   = n_alt_sites >= 5      
  ) %>%
  group_by(profile, sample_type, num.fragments) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    p_pass_tier1  = mean(pass_tier1, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_has_breadth = mean(has_breadth, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_has_signal  = mean(has_signal, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_hg_match    = mean(haplogroup_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_hap_match   = mean(haplotype_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cascade_long <- cascade_df %>%
  pivot_longer(starts_with("p_"), names_to = "metric", values_to = "p") %>%
  mutate(metric = recode(metric,
                         p_pass_tier1  = "Pass Tier 1",
                         p_has_breadth = "Breadth ≥10× (≥0.5)",
                         p_has_signal  = "ALT sites ≥ 5",
                         p_hg_match    = "Paired Haplogroup Match",
                         p_hap_match   = "Paired Haplotype Match"))

ggplot(cascade_long, aes(x = num.fragments, y = p, group = metric)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(sample_type ~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Number of LR-PCR fragments amplified",
       y = "Proportion of barcodes",
       title = "Recovery Cascade Across Laboratory and Bioinformatic Filters")


```

## small n per fragment in some cases / figure is not really informative

```{r}
ggplot(decay_df, aes(x = threshold, y = breadth, group = barcode, color = sample_type)) +
```

```{r}
panel_locs <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(profile = nm, POS = as.double(POS))
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))

ggplot(panel_locs, aes(x = POS)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 200) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +

       title = "Genomic distribution of SNP panel sites by QC profile")


```

```{r}
hap_state_long <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {

  panel_pos <- res$tier3$panel %>% select(CHROM, POS) %>% distinct()

  ref_by_pos <- res$snps %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    group_by(POS) %>%
    summarise(REF_base = first(REF), .groups = "drop")

  res$hapmat %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -barcode, names_to = "POS", values_to = "base") %>%
    mutate(POS = as.double(POS), profile = nm) %>%
    left_join(ref_by_pos, by = "POS") %>%
    mutate(
      state = case_when(
        is.na(base) ~ "missing",
        base == REF_base ~ "ref",
        TRUE ~ "alt"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(profile, barcode, POS, state)
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))) %>%
  left_join(master %>% distinct(profile, barcode, sample_type, num.fragments),
            by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  mutate(fragment_cat = fct_inorder(as.factor(num.fragments)))

ggplot(hap_state_long, aes(x = POS, y = barcode, fill = state)) +
  geom_tile() +
  facet_grid(fragment_cat ~ profile, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position (panel SNP sites)", y = "Barcode", fill = "State",
       title = "SNP allele states across panel sites (REF vs ALT), stratified by fragments")


```

```{r}

depth_dir <- "depth"
depth_files <- list.files(depth_dir, pattern = "_clean\\.depth$", full.names = TRUE)

depth_long0 <- map_dfr(depth_files, \(f) {
  bc <- str_remove(basename(f), "_clean\\.depth$")
  read_tsv(
    f,
    col_names = c("CHROM","POS","DP"),
    col_types = cols(CHROM = col_character(),
                     POS = col_double(),
                     DP = col_double()),
    progress = FALSE, show_col_types = FALSE
  ) %>% mutate(barcode = bc)
})

meta_bp <- master %>%
  distinct(barcode, profile, sample_type, num.fragments)
depth_long <- depth_long0 %>%
  inner_join(meta_bp, by = "barcode")
profile

meta_bp_1 <- master %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    profile = dplyr::first(na.omit(profile)),
    sample_type = dplyr::first(na.omit(sample_type)),
    num.fragments = dplyr::first(na.omit(num.fragments)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

depth_long <- depth_long0 %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  left_join(meta_bp_1, by = "barcode")

depth_panel <- depth_long %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(.data$profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))
panel_pos_all <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>% transmute(profile = nm, POS = as.double(POS))
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))
panel_pos_all <- imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$tier3$panel %>%
    transmute(profile = nm,
              POS = as.double(POS))
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")))
depth_panel <- depth_long %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(.data$profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))) %>%
  inner_join(panel_pos_all, by = c("profile","POS")) %>%
  mutate(fragment_cat = fct_inorder(as.factor(num.fragments)))


rep_barcodes <- depth_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(num.fragments)) %>%
  group_by(num.fragments) %>%
  summarise(barcode = dplyr::first(barcode), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pull(barcode)



depth_reps <- depth_long %>%
  filter(barcode %in% rep_barcodes)

ggplot(depth_reps, aes(x = POS, y = DP, color = sample_type)) +
  geom_line() +
  facet_wrap(~ barcode, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Mitogenome position", y = "Depth",
       title = "Representative depth profiles (one per fragment category)")
```

```{r}

paired_edna <- master %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA", !is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  left_join(
    master %>%
      select(profile, barcode, haplogroup) %>%
      rename(sample_pair = barcode, haplogroup_tissue = haplogroup),
    by = c("profile","sample_pair")
  ) %>%
  mutate(haplogroup_match = !is.na(haplogroup_tissue) & haplogroup == haplogroup_tissue)

hg_has_tissue <- master %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"), .groups = "drop")

master2 <- master %>%
  left_join(hg_has_tissue, by = c("profile","haplogroup"))

rules_df <- paired_edna %>%
  left_join(tier1_thresh, by = "profile") %>%
  mutate(
    rule_frag2   = num.fragments >= 2,
    rule_breadth = breadth_10x >= 0.5,
    rule_reads   = mapped_primary_reads >= tier1_min_reads,
    rule_depth50 = mean_depth >= 50,
    rule_alt5    = n_alt_sites >= 5
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(starts_with("rule_"), names_to = "rule", values_to = "pass") %>%
  group_by(profile, rule, pass) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    success = mean(haplogroup_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(pass == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(rule = recode(rule,
                       rule_frag2   = "Fragments ≥ 1",
                       rule_breadth = "Breadth_10x ≥ 0.5",
                       rule_depth50 = "Mean depth ≥ 50",
                       rule_alt5    = "ALT sites ≥ 3"))

ggplot(rules_df, aes(x = rule, y = success)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Rule (eDNA-only)",
       y = "Paired haplogroup match rate",
       title = "Which eDNA QC/lab thresholds predict correct haplogroup recovery?")


```


```{r}
paired_valid <- master_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_pair)) %>%
  mutate(sample_pair = as.character(sample_pair)) %>%
  inner_join(
    master_clean %>%
      select(profile, barcode, haplogroup, haplotype, sample_type) %>%
      rename(
        sample_pair = barcode,
        pair_haplogroup = haplogroup,
        pair_haplotype  = haplotype,
        pair_sample_type = sample_type
      ),
    by = c("profile", "sample_pair")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    haplogroup_match = haplogroup == pair_haplogroup,
    haplotype_match  = haplotype  == pair_haplotype,
    pair_exists_in_profile = TRUE
  )

paired_valid %>% count(profile)
paired_valid %>% count(profile, haplogroup_match)
paired_valid %>% count(profile, haplotype_match)


paired_valid_edna <- paired_valid %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA")

paired_valid_edna %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pairs = n(),
    haplogroup_match_rate = mean(haplogroup_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    haplotype_match_rate  = mean(haplotype_match,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}

rules_df <- paired_edna %>%
  mutate(
    rule_frag1   = num.fragments >= 1,
    rule_breadth = breadth_10x >= 0.5,
    rule_depth50 = mean_depth >= 50,
    rule_alt3    = n_alt_sites >= 3
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(starts_with("rule_"), names_to = "rule", values_to = "pass") %>%
  group_by(profile, rule) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pass = sum(pass, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_total = n(),
    frac_pass = n_pass / n_total,
    success = mean(haplogroup_match[pass], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    rule = recode(rule,
                  rule_frag1   = "Fragments ≥ 1",
                  rule_breadth = "Breadth_10x ≥ 0.5",
                  rule_depth50 = "Mean depth ≥ 50",
                  rule_alt3    = "ALT sites ≥ 3")
  )

ggplot(rules_df, aes(x = rule, y = success)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Rule (eDNA-only)",
       y = "Paired haplogroup match rate among samples that pass",
       title = "Which eDNA QC/lab thresholds enrich for correct haplogroup recovery?")
```

```{r}
paired_valid_edna %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup_match) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_frag = mean(num.fragments, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_breadth = mean(breadth_10x, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_alt = mean(n_alt_sites, na.rm=TRUE),
    .groups="drop"
  )


```

## strict -\> 0 alt allele sites -\> collapsing to reference/no phylogenetic resolution

## moderate -\> successful matches have more fragments, higher breadth, fewer alt sites -\> false haplogroups may be driven by spurious alt calls

## relaxed -\> higher breadth and fewer alt sites, relaxed filtering could introduce false polymorphisms that shift haplogroup assignment

# too many ALT sites = wrong haplogroup ...

## ALT -\> diff from reference (bio polymorphisms.. likely)

### counting alt sites within a qc defined snp panel under different filters

```{r}
paired_valid %>%
  filter(sample_type == "tissue") %>%
  summarise(mean_alt = mean(n_alt_sites))

```

```{r}
paired_valid_edna %>%
  mutate(
    alt_deviation = n_alt_sites - mean(n_alt_sites[haplogroup_match])
  )
```

```{r}
glm_fit <- glm(
  haplogroup_match ~ n_alt_sites + breadth_10x + num.fragments,
  data = paired_valid_edna,
  family = binomial
)

summary(glm_fit)
exp(coef(glm_fit))


```

## predicting successful eDNA haplogroup recovery -\> moderate filtering, more than 2 fragments amplified, breads 10x \> 0.7, alt sites \< 5


```{r}
# common positions across all three panels
common_panel <- reduce(
  map(profile_results, \(x) x$tier3$panel %>% dplyr::select(CHROM, POS) %>% distinct()),
  inner_join,
  by = c("CHROM","POS")
)

#rebuild hapmat for each profile using the SAME common_panel
profile_results_common <- imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  res$hapmat_common <- make_hapmat_REFfill(
    snps = res$snps,
    panel_tbl = common_panel,
    barcodes_used = res$barcodes_used,
    vaf_low = res$params$vaf_low,
    min_alt_hi = res$params$min_alt_hi
  )
  res
})

hap_calls_common <- imap_dfr(profile_results_common, \(res, nm) {
  hap_id_from_hapmat(res$hapmat_common) %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
})

hap_wide_common <- hap_calls_common %>%
  dplyr::select(barcode, profile, hap_id) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = profile, values_from = hap_id, names_prefix = "hap_") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(qc_sub %>% dplyr::select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode") %>%
  dplyr::relocate(sample_type, .after = barcode)

hap_wide_common

```

```{r}
res <- profile_results$relaxed
panel_pos <- res$tier3$panel %>% dplyr::select(CHROM, POS) %>% distinct()

alt_present_fix <- res$snps %>%
  dplyr::semi_join(panel_pos, by=c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(barcode %in% res$barcodes_used) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pass_alt = !is.na(vaf) & vaf >= res$params$vaf_low & alt_count >= res$params$min_alt_hi) %>%
  dplyr::filter(pass_alt) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(CHROM, POS, barcode) %>%          
  dplyr::count(CHROM, POS, name = "n_pass_alt")    

summary(alt_present_fix$n_pass_alt)
```

```{r}
  tibble::tibble(
    profile = nm,
    n_barcodes = length(res$barcodes_used),
    n_panel_sites = nrow(res$tier3$panel)
  )
})
```

```{r}
c(n_sites = ncol(hapmat)-1,
  n_var_sites = sum(apply(as.matrix(hapmat %>% dplyr::select(-barcode)), 2, \(x) length(unique(x)) > 1)))

```

```{r}

hapmat <- profile_results$relaxed$hapmat

dna <- hapmat %>%
  column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%   
  as.matrix() %>%
  as.DNAbin()


h <- haplotype(dna)
nrow(h)

```

```{r}

summarise_profile_haps <- function(hapmat, k = 4) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    as.DNAbin()

  h <- pegas::haplotype(dna)
  idx <- attr(h, "index")
  hap_names <- rownames(h)

  hap_assign <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_along(idx), \(i) {
    tibble(
      barcode = rownames(dna)[ idx[[i]] ],
      haplotype = hap_names[i]
    )
  })

  d_bar <- ape::dist.dna(dna, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)
  hc <- stats::hclust(d_bar, method = "average")
  grp <- stats::cutree(hc, k = k)

  hapgroup_assign <- tibble(
    barcode = names(grp),
    hapgroup = paste0("HG", grp)
  )

  list(
    hap_assign = hap_assign,
    hapgroup_assign = hapgroup_assign,
    dist_barcode = d_bar,
    h = h
  )
}


hap_summaries <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  out <- summarise_profile_haps(res$hapmat, k = 20)
  out$profile <- nm
  out
})

hap_table <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_summaries, \(obj, nm) {
  obj$hap_assign %>%
    left_join(obj$hapgroup_assign, by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
}) %>%
  left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")

hap_table %>% count(profile, sample_type, hapgroup)



```


```{r}
anchor <- hap_table %>%
  filter(profile == "strict") %>%
  select(barcode, HG_strict = hapgroup)

hap_table_aligned <- hap_table %>%
  left_join(anchor, by = "barcode") %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  group_modify(\(d, key) {
    if (key$profile == "strict") {
      d %>% mutate(hapgroup_aligned = hapgroup)
    } else {
      map_tbl <- d %>%
        count(hapgroup, HG_strict) %>%
        group_by(hapgroup) %>%
        slice_max(n, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        select(hapgroup, hapgroup_aligned = HG_strict)

      d %>% left_join(map_tbl, by = "hapgroup")
    }
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

```

```{r}
ggplot(hap_table_aligned, aes(x = hapgroup_aligned, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_bar(position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Haplogroup (aligned to strict)", y = "Number of barcodes", fill = "Sample type")

```

```{r}
choose_k_silhouette <- function(d, k_max = 20, k_min = 2) {
  hc <- hclust(d, method = "average")
  ks <- k_min:k_max
  sil <- sapply(ks, function(k) {
    grp <- cutree(hc, k = k)
    mean(cluster::silhouette(grp, d)[, "sil_width"])
  })
  tibble(k = ks, mean_sil = sil) %>% arrange(desc(mean_sil))
}

call_hapgroups_sil <- function(hapmat, k_max = 20) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    ape::as.DNAbin()
  d <- ape::dist.dna(dna, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)

  sil_tbl <- choose_k_silhouette(d, k_max = k_max)
  k_best <- sil_tbl$k[1]

  hc <- hclust(d, method = "average")
  grp <- cutree(hc, k = k_best)

  list(
    k_best = k_best,
    sil_tbl = sil_tbl,
    calls = tibble(barcode = names(grp), hapgroup = paste0("G", grp))
  )
}

hg_by_profile <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  out <- call_hapgroups_sil(res$hapmat, k_max = 20)
  out$profile <- nm
  out
})

purrr::imap_dfr(hg_by_profile, \(x, nm) tibble(profile = nm, k_best = x$k_best))


```

```{r}
call_hapgroups_threshold <- function(hapmat, max_prop_diff = 0.01) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    ape::as.DNAbin()
  d <- ape::dist.dna(dna, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)

  hc <- hclust(d, method = "average")
  grp <- cutree(hc, h = max_prop_diff)

  tibble(barcode = names(grp), hapgroup = paste0("G", grp))
}

count_groups_for_h <- function(hapmat, hs = seq(0.001, 0.05, by = 0.001)) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    ape::as.DNAbin()
  d <- ape::dist.dna(dna, model="raw", pairwise.deletion=FALSE)
  hc <- hclust(d, method="average")

  tibble(
    h = hs,
    n_groups = sapply(hs, \(h) length(unique(cutree(hc, h = h))))
  )
}

tbl <- count_groups_for_h(profile_results$strict$hapmat)
tbl %>% filter(n_groups <= 20) %>% slice(1)


```

```{r}

call_haps_from_hapmat <- function(hapmat) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    as.DNAbin()

  h <- haplotype(dna)
  idx <- attr(h, "index")
  hap_names <- rownames(h)

  hap_assign <- map_dfr(seq_along(idx), \(i) {
    tibble(
      barcode = rownames(dna)[ idx[[i]] ],
      haplotype = hap_names[i]
    )
  })

  list(dna = dna, h = h, hap_assign = hap_assign)
}

hap_per_profile <- imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  out <- call_haps_from_hapmat(res$hapmat)
  out$profile <- nm
  out
})

hap_table <- imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  obj$hap_assign %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
}) %>%
  left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")

# how many haplotypes per profile
imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  tibble(profile = nm, n_haplotypes = nrow(obj$h))
})

hap_sizes <- hap_table %>%
  count(profile, haplotype, sample_type, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(total = tissue + eDNA)

hap_sizes %>% arrange(profile, desc(total)) %>% group_by(profile) %>% slice_head(n = 10)


```

```{r}
  h <- pegas::haplotype(dna)

      barcode = rownames(dna)[ idx[[i]] ],
      haplotype = hap_names[i]
    )
  })

  list(dna = dna, h = h, hap_assign = hap_assign)
}

hap_per_profile <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
```

```{r}
call_haplogroups_by_prop_threshold <- function(h_obj, max_prop_diff = 0.04) {
  d <- ape::dist.dna(h_obj, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)

  hc <- hclust(d, method = "average")
  grp <- cutree(hc, h = max_prop_diff + 1e-10)

  tibble(
    haplotype = rownames(h_obj),
    haplogroup = paste0("HG", grp)
  )
}

hg_sensitivity_prop <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  tibble(
    profile = nm,
    max_prop_diff = seq(0.001, 0.05, by = 0.001),
    n_haplogroups = sapply(seq(0.001, 0.05, by = 0.001),
                           \(thr) n_distinct(call_haplogroups_by_prop_threshold(obj$h, thr)$haplogroup))
  )
})

hg_sensitivity_prop %>%
  group_by(profile) %>%
  slice_min(abs(n_haplogroups - 15), n = 1)
```

```{r}

call_haplogroups_by_snp_threshold <- function(hap_mat, max_snp_diff = 2,
                                             missing = c(NA, "N", "-", "?")) {
  missing <- unique(missing)

  h <- as.data.frame(hap_mat, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if (is.null(rownames(h)) || any(rownames(h) == "")) {
    rownames(h) <- paste0("H", seq_len(nrow(h)))
  }
  hap_ids <- rownames(h)
  snp_dist <- function(a, b) {
    a <- as.character(a); b <- as.character(b)
    ok <- !(is.na(a) | is.na(b) | a %in% missing | b %in% missing)
    if (!any(ok)) return(Inf)              # no comparable sites
    sum(a[ok] != b[ok])
  }

  n <- nrow(h)
  if (n == 0) return(tibble::tibble(haplotype = character(), haplogroup = character()))
  if (n == 1) return(tibble::tibble(haplotype = hap_ids, haplogroup = "HG1"))
  edges <- list()
  k <- 1L
  for (i in seq_len(n - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      d <- snp_dist(h[i, ], h[j, ])
      if (is.finite(d) && d <= max_snp_diff) {
        edges[[k]] <- c(hap_ids[i], hap_ids[j])
        k <- k + 1L
      }
    }
  }

  if (length(edges) == 0) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      haplotype = hap_ids,
      haplogroup = paste0("HG", seq_along(hap_ids))
    ))
  }

  edge_df <- do.call(rbind, edges)
  g <- igraph::graph_from_edgelist(edge_df, directed = FALSE)
  comps <- igraph::components(g)$membership

  not_in_graph <- setdiff(hap_ids, names(comps))
  if (length(not_in_graph) > 0) {
    max_comp <- if (length(comps) > 0) max(comps) else 0
    comps <- c(comps, setNames(seq_len(length(not_in_graph)) + max_comp, not_in_graph))
  }

  comp_ids <- unique(comps[hap_ids])
  comp_map <- setNames(paste0("HG", seq_along(comp_ids)), comp_ids)

  tibble::tibble(
    haplotype = hap_ids,
    haplogroup = unname(comp_map[as.character(comps[hap_ids])])
  )
}


haplogroup_map <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  call_haplogroups_by_snp_threshold(obj$h, max_snp_diff = 2) %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
})

barcode_haps_hg <- hap_table %>%
  left_join(haplogroup_map, by = c("profile", "haplotype"))

```

```{r}
pick_threshold_for_ngroups <- function(h_obj, target_max = 20,
                                      grid = seq(0.001, 0.10, by = 0.001)) {
  d <- ape::dist.dna(h_obj, model="raw", pairwise.deletion=FALSE)
  hc <- hclust(d, method="average")
  n_groups <- sapply(grid, \(h) length(unique(cutree(hc, h = h))))
  tibble(h = grid, n_groups = n_groups) %>%
    filter(n_groups <= target_max) %>%
    slice(1)
}

haplogroup_map_ng20 <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  thr <- pick_threshold_for_ngroups(obj$h, target_max = 20)
  d <- ape::dist.dna(obj$h, model="raw", pairwise.deletion=FALSE)
  hc <- hclust(d, method="average")
  grp <- cutree(hc, h = thr$h[1] + 1e-10)

  tibble(profile = nm,
         haplotype = rownames(obj$h),
         haplogroup = paste0("HG", grp),
         h_used = thr$h[1],
         n_groups = thr$n_groups[1])
})

haplogroup_map_ng20 %>% distinct(profile, h_used, n_groups)

```

```{r}
  select(profile, barcode, haplotype, sample_type) %>%
  left_join(
    haplogroup_map_ng20 %>%
      select(profile, haplotype, haplogroup),
    by = c("profile", "haplotype")
  )


hg_flags <- barcode_haps_hg_ng20 %>%  
  group_by(profile, haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(
    has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
    has_eDNA   = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

edna_capture <- barcode_haps_hg_ng20 %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  left_join(hg_flags, by = c("profile","haplogroup")) %>%
  summarise(
    n_eDNA = n(),
    n_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = sum(has_tissue),
    prop_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = mean(has_tissue),
    .by = profile
  )

edna_capture
```

```{r}

call_haps_from_hapmat <- function(hapmat) {
  dna <- hapmat %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix() %>%
    ape::as.DNAbin()

  h <- pegas::haplotype(dna)
  idx <- attr(h, "index")
  hap_names <- rownames(h)

  hap_assign <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_along(idx), \(i) {
    tibble(
      barcode  = rownames(dna)[ idx[[i]] ],
      haplotype = hap_names[i]
    )
  })

  list(dna = dna, h = h, hap_assign = hap_assign)
}

pick_threshold_for_ngroups <- function(h_obj, target_max = 20,
                                      grid = seq(0.001, 0.20, by = 0.001)) {
  d  <- ape::dist.dna(h_obj, model = "raw", pairwise.deletion = FALSE)
  hc <- stats::hclust(d, method = "average")
  n_groups <- sapply(grid, \(h) length(unique(stats::cutree(hc, h = h))))
  tibble(h = grid, n_groups = n_groups) %>%
    dplyr::filter(n_groups <= target_max) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1)
}

haplogroups_by_cap <- function(h_obj, cap = 20,
                               grid = seq(0.001, 0.20, by = 0.001)) {
  thr <- pick_threshold_for_ngroups(h_obj, target_max = cap, grid = grid)

  d  <- ape::dist.dna(h_obj, model="raw", pairwise.deletion=FALSE)
  hc <- stats::hclust(d, method="average")
  grp <- stats::cutree(hc, h = thr$h[1] + 1e-10)

  list(
    map = tibble(haplotype = rownames(h_obj),
                 haplogroup = paste0("HG", grp)),
    h_used = thr$h[1],
    n_groups = thr$n_groups[1]
  )
}

caps <- c(10, 20, 30)

hap_per_profile <- purrr::imap(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  out <- call_haps_from_hapmat(res$hapmat)
  out$profile <- nm
  out
})

hap_table <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  obj$hap_assign %>% mutate(profile = nm)
}) %>%
  left_join(qc_sub %>% dplyr::select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")

cap_results <- purrr::map_dfr(caps, \(cap) {
  hg_map <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
    hg <- haplogroups_by_cap(obj$h, cap = cap)
    hg$map %>%
      mutate(profile = nm,
             cap = cap,
             h_used = hg$h_used,
             n_haplogroups = hg$n_groups)
  })

  barcode_haps_hg <- hap_table %>%
    dplyr::select(profile, barcode, haplotype, sample_type) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(hg_map %>% dplyr::select(profile, cap, haplotype, haplogroup),
                     by = c("profile", "haplotype")) %>%
    mutate(cap = cap)

  # haplogroup flags (tissue/eDNA present)
  hg_flags <- barcode_haps_hg %>%
    group_by(profile, cap, haplogroup) %>%
    summarise(
      has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
      has_eDNA   = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # fraction of eDNA barcodes that fall into a haplogroup containing tissue
  edna_capture <- barcode_haps_hg %>%
    filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
    left_join(hg_flags, by = c("profile", "cap", "haplogroup")) %>%
    summarise(
      n_eDNA = n(),
      n_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = sum(has_tissue),
      prop_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = mean(has_tissue),
      .by = c(profile, cap)
    )

  hg_meta <- hg_map %>%
    distinct(profile, cap, h_used, n_haplogroups)

  edna_capture %>%
    left_join(hg_meta, by = c("profile", "cap"))
})

cap_results %>% arrange(profile, cap)




```

```{r}
ggplot(cap_results, aes(x = cap, y = prop_eDNA_in_tissue_hg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(aes(group = profile)) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Haplogroup cap (max groups)",
       y = "Proportion of eDNA in tissue haplogroups")

cap_results2 <- cap_results %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("relaxed","moderate","strict")))

ggplot(cap_results2, aes(x = cap, y = prop_eDNA_in_tissue_hg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_line(aes(group = profile)) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Haplogroup cap (max groups)",
       y = "Proportion of eDNA in tissue haplogroups")

```

### \^ capping the max num of hap at 10 -\> coarser haplogroups and almost always high "capture"

## cap at 20/30, allowing fine level splitting -\> some eDNA haplogroups become eDNA-only

# relaxed snp set is stable, moderate drops then stabilizes, strict drops strongly by cap 30, meaning that strict + fine haplogroup partitioning makes some eDNA fall into eDNA only clusters

# represents biological conclusion that most eDNA lineages are represented in tissue unless you "oversplit" (high cap) the data

```{r}

cap <- 20

haplogroup_map_cap <- purrr::imap_dfr(hap_per_profile, \(obj, nm) {
  hg <- haplogroups_by_cap(obj$h, cap = cap)
  hg$map %>%
    mutate(profile = nm,
           h_used = hg$h_used,
           n_haplogroups = hg$n_groups)
})

barcode_haps_hg_cap <- hap_table %>%
  dplyr::select(profile, barcode, haplotype, sample_type) %>%
  left_join(haplogroup_map_cap %>% dplyr::select(profile, haplotype, haplogroup),
            by = c("profile", "haplotype"))

hap_sizes <- barcode_haps_hg_cap %>%
  count(profile, haplotype, sample_type, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = sample_type, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(total = tissue + eDNA)

ggplot(hap_sizes, aes(x = total)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ profile, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Barcodes per haplotype", y = "Number of haplotypes")

```

# many singleton haplotypes

# 2-5 smaller bars with shared haplotypes across multiple barcodes

```{r}
hg_flags <- barcode_haps_hg_cap %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(
    has_tissue = any(sample_type == "tissue"),
    has_eDNA   = any(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

edna_capture <- barcode_haps_hg_cap %>%
  filter(sample_type == "eDNA") %>%
  left_join(hg_flags, by = c("profile", "haplogroup")) %>%
  summarise(
    n_eDNA = n(),
    n_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = sum(has_tissue),
    prop_eDNA_in_tissue_hg = mean(has_tissue),
    .by = profile
  )

edna_capture

```

## haplogroup concordence overall is over 90% for all three panels

```{r}
    n_tissue = sum(sample_type == "tissue"),
    n_eDNA   = sum(sample_type == "eDNA"),

    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(profile, desc(n))
```

```{r}

# compute ALT sites per barcode from a profile result
barcode_alt_counts <- function(res, profile_name) {
  panel_pos <- res$tier3$panel %>%
    dplyr::select(CHROM, POS) %>%
    distinct()

  # reference base per POS from SNP table 
  ref_by_pos <- res$snps %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(REF_base = dplyr::first(REF), .groups = "drop")

  # hapmat -> long
  hap_long <- res$hapmat %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = -barcode,
      names_to = "POS",
      values_to = "base"
    ) %>%
    mutate(POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
    left_join(ref_by_pos, by = c("POS")) %>%   
    mutate(is_alt = !is.na(REF_base) & base != REF_base)
  hap_long %>%
    summarise(
      profile = profile_name,
      n_panel_sites = dplyr::n_distinct(POS),
      n_alt_sites   = sum(is_alt, na.rm = TRUE),
      .by = barcode
    ) %>%
    left_join(qc_sub %>% dplyr::select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")
}

barcode_snp_counts <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, barcode_alt_counts)

barcode_snp_counts %>% arrange(profile, sample_type, desc(n_alt_sites)) %>% head(20)

```

```{r}
barcode_alt_sets <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {

  panel_pos <- res$tier3$panel %>%
    dplyr::select(CHROM, POS) %>%
    distinct()

  ref_by_pos <- res$snps %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(REF_base = dplyr::first(REF), .groups = "drop")

  hap_long <- res$hapmat %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -barcode, names_to = "POS", values_to = "base") %>%
    mutate(POS = as.double(POS)) %>%
    left_join(ref_by_pos, by = "POS") %>%
    mutate(is_alt = !is.na(REF_base) & base != REF_base) %>%
    filter(is_alt) %>%
    distinct(barcode, POS)

  hap_long %>%
    summarise(alt_pos = list(sort(unique(POS))), .by = barcode) %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
})

alt_with_groups <- barcode_haps_hg_ng20 %>%
  select(profile, barcode, sample_type, haplogroup, haplotype) %>%
  left_join(barcode_alt_sets, by = c("profile","barcode")) %>%
  mutate(alt_pos = replace_na(alt_pos, list(numeric(0))))

overlap_stats <- function(a, b) {
  inter <- length(intersect(a, b))
  uni   <- length(union(a, b))
  tibble(
    overlap = inter,
    union   = uni,
    jaccard = ifelse(uni > 0, inter/uni, NA_real_)
  )
}

hg_overlap <- alt_with_groups %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup) %>%
  summarise(
    tissue_sets = list(alt_pos[sample_type == "tissue"]),
    edna_sets   = list(alt_pos[sample_type == "eDNA"]),
    n_tissue = sum(sample_type == "tissue"),
    n_eDNA   = sum(sample_type == "eDNA"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pair_stats = pmap(list(tissue_sets, edna_sets), \(tsets, esets) {
      if (length(tsets) == 0 || length(esets) == 0) return(tibble())
      purrr::map_dfr(tsets, \(t) purrr::map_dfr(esets, \(e) overlap_stats(t, e)))
    })
  ) %>%
  unnest(pair_stats) %>%
  group_by(profile, haplogroup, n_tissue, n_eDNA) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_overlap  = mean(overlap, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_jaccard  = mean(jaccard, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_overlap = median(overlap, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

hg_overlap %>% arrange(profile, desc(mean_jaccard)) %>% head(20)


```

```{r}

hap_id_from_hapmat <- function(hapmat_df) {
  stopifnot("barcode" %in% names(hapmat_df))
  mat <- as.matrix(hapmat_df %>% dplyr::select(-barcode))
  hap_string <- apply(mat, 1, paste0, collapse = "")

  tibble::tibble(
    barcode    = hapmat_df$barcode,
    hap_string = hap_string,
    hap_id     = paste0("H", substr(digest::digest(hap_string, algo = "sha1"), 1, 10))
  )
}


hap_calls <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, nm) {
  hap_id_from_hapmat(res$hapmat) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(profile = nm)
})

hap_wide <- hap_calls %>%
  dplyr::select(barcode, profile, hap_id) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = profile, values_from = hap_id, names_prefix = "hap_") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(qc_sub %>% dplyr::select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode") %>%
  dplyr::relocate(sample_type, .after = barcode)

hap_wide
```

```{r}
    profile = sub("^filtered_snps_", "", profile),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed")),
    eDNA_sex = forcats::fct_explicit_na(as.factor(eDNA_sex), na_level = "unknown")
  ) %>%

    color = "eDNA Sex"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
panel_recovery_summary <- imap_dfr(profile_results, function(res, nm) {

  hapmat <- res$hapmat
  panel_n <- length(res$panel_pos)

  hapmat2 <- hapmat %>%
    left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type),
              by = "barcode")

  # count callable SNPs per barcode
  per_barcode <- hapmat2 %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(barcode, sample_type),
      names_to = "POS",
      values_to = "base"
    ) %>%
    group_by(barcode, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n_callable = sum(!is.na(base)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      frac_callable = n_callable / panel_n
    )

  per_barcode %>%
    group_by(sample_type) %>%
    summarise(
      profile = nm,
      tier1_min_reads = res$params$tier1_min_reads,
      panel_size = panel_n,
      n_barcodes = n(),
      mean_callable = mean(n_callable),
      mean_frac_callable = mean(frac_callable),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

})

```

```{r}
  hapmat2 <- hapmat %>%
    left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type),

      tier1_min_reads = res$params$tier1_min_reads,
```

```{r}

profiles <- list(
  strict   = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_strict_d10000",
                  tier1_min_reads=1000,
                  vaf_low=0.70, frac_low_max=0.60, maf_min=0.25,
                  min_alt_hi=2, alt_support_min=2),
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000",
                  tier1_min_reads=500,
                  vaf_low=0.65, frac_low_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20,
                  min_alt_hi=2, alt_support_min=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",
                  tier1_min_reads=250,
                  vaf_low=0.60, frac_low_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15,
                  min_alt_hi=2, alt_support_min=2)
)

qc_sub <- read_csv("barcode_master_qc_d10000.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode))
stopifnot(all(c("barcode","sample_type","mapped_primary_reads") %in% names(qc_sub)))

read_profile_snps <- function(dir, keep_barcodes = NULL) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0) stop("No *_snps.tsv files found in: ", dir)

  read_one <- function(path) {
    bc <- str_remove(basename(path), "_snps\\.tsv$")
    if (!is.null(keep_barcodes) && !(bc %in% keep_barcodes)) return(NULL)

    x <- readr::read_tsv(
      path,
      col_names = FALSE,
      col_types = cols(
        X1 = col_character(),  # CHROM
        X2 = col_double(),     # POS
        X3 = col_character(),  # REF
        X4 = col_character(),  # ALT
        X5 = col_double(),     # QUAL
        X6 = col_double(),     # DP
        X7 = col_character()   # DP4
      ),
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      progress = FALSE
    )

    names(x) <- c("CHROM","POS","REF","ALT","QUAL","DP","DP4")

    x %>%
      mutate(
        barcode = bc,
        DP4 = coalesce(DP4, ""),
        DP4 = str_trim(DP4),
        DP4 = str_replace(DP4, ",+$", "")
      )
  }

  snps <- purrr::map_dfr(files, read_one)
  snps %>%
    mutate(
      dp4 = str_split(DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      rf = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dp4[,1])),
      rr = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dp4[,2])),
      af = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dp4[,3])),
      ar = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(dp4[,4])),
      alt_count = coalesce(af,0) + coalesce(ar,0),
      vaf = if_else(!is.na(DP) & DP > 0, alt_count / DP, NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, rf, rr, af, ar, alt_count, vaf)
}

tier3_define_panel_variant_only <- function(snps,
                                            barcodes_used,
                                            vaf_low,
                                            frac_low_max,
                                            maf_min,
                                            min_alt_hi,
                                            alt_support_min) {

  all_barcodes <- sort(unique(barcodes_used))

  snps <- snps %>% filter(barcode %in% all_barcodes)

  snps2 <- snps %>%
    mutate(low_flag = is.na(vaf) | (vaf < vaf_low) | (alt_count < min_alt_hi))
  pos_low <- snps2 %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(
      n_var_rows = n_distinct(barcode),
      n_low_var  = n_distinct(barcode[low_flag]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      n_missing = length(all_barcodes) - n_var_rows,
      frac_low  = (n_low_var + n_missing) / length(all_barcodes)
    )

  pos_low_keep <- pos_low %>% filter(frac_low <= frac_low_max)
  alt_present <- snps2 %>%
    filter(!low_flag, vaf >= vaf_low) %>%
    distinct(CHROM, POS, barcode) %>%
    mutate(alt_present = 1L)

  maf_tbl_all <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    CHROM = sort(unique(snps2$CHROM)),
    POS   = sort(unique(snps2$POS)),
    barcode = all_barcodes
  ) %>%
    left_join(alt_present, by = c("CHROM","POS","barcode")) %>%
    mutate(alt_present = replace_na(alt_present, 0L)) %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(
      p_alt = mean(alt_present),
      maf   = pmin(p_alt, 1 - p_alt),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  maf_keep <- maf_tbl_all %>% filter(maf >= maf_min)
  alt_support_all <- snps2 %>%
    filter(!low_flag, vaf >= vaf_low) %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(alt_support = n_distinct(barcode), .groups = "drop")

  alt_keep <- alt_support_all %>% filter(alt_support >= alt_support_min)
  panel <- pos_low_keep %>%
    inner_join(maf_keep, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    inner_join(alt_keep, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    arrange(POS)

  diag <- tibble(
    step = c("positions_total",
             paste0("frac_low <= ", frac_low_max),
             paste0("MAF >= ", maf_min),
             paste0("ALT_support >= ", alt_support_min),
             "final_intersection"),
    n_positions = c(
      n_distinct(snps2$POS),
      nrow(pos_low_keep),
      nrow(maf_keep),
      nrow(alt_keep),
      nrow(panel)
    )
  )

  list(panel = panel, diag = diag,
       pos_low_all = pos_low,
       maf_tbl_all = maf_tbl_all,
       alt_support_all = alt_support_all)
}

make_hapmat_REFfill <- function(snps, panel_tbl, barcodes_used, vaf_low, min_alt_hi) {
  panel_pos <- panel_tbl %>% transmute(CHROM, POS) %>% distinct() %>% arrange(POS)
  stopifnot(nrow(panel_pos) > 0)
  all_barcodes <- sort(unique(barcodes_used))
  ref_by_pos <- snps %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    group_by(CHROM, POS) %>%
    summarise(REF_base = first(REF), .groups = "drop")

  calls <- snps %>%
    filter(barcode %in% all_barcodes) %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    mutate(
      low_flag = is.na(vaf) | (vaf < vaf_low) | (alt_count < min_alt_hi),
      allele = if_else(!low_flag & vaf >= vaf_low, ALT, REF)
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, CHROM, POS, allele)

  grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    barcode = all_barcodes,
    panel_pos
  )

  hap_long <- grid %>%
    left_join(calls, by = c("barcode","CHROM","POS")) %>%
    left_join(ref_by_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    mutate(base = if_else(!is.na(allele), allele, REF_base)) %>%
    mutate(POS = as.character(POS)) %>%
    select(barcode, POS, base)

  hap_long %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = POS, values_from = base) %>%
    arrange(barcode)
}

run_profile <- function(p, name, qc_sub,
                        qc_reads_col = "mapped_primary_reads",
                        save_outputs = TRUE) {

  keep_barcodes <- qc_sub %>%
    filter(sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
    filter(.data[[qc_reads_col]] >= p$tier1_min_reads) %>%
    pull(barcode) %>%
    unique()

  if (length(keep_barcodes) == 0) {
    stop("No barcodes passed Tier-1 for profile ", name,
         " using ", qc_reads_col, " >= ", p$tier1_min_reads)
  }

  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir, keep_barcodes = keep_barcodes) %>%
    left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")

  t3 <- tier3_define_panel_variant_only(
    snps,
    barcodes_used = keep_barcodes,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    frac_low_max = p$frac_low_max,
    maf_min = p$maf_min,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi,
    alt_support_min = p$alt_support_min
  )

  message("\nTier3 diagnostics for: ", name)
  print(t3$diag)

  if (nrow(t3$panel) == 0) {
    stop("Tier-3 panel is empty for profile: ", name,
         "\nTry lowering maf_min or vaf_low slightly for this profile.")
  }

  hapmat <- make_hapmat_REFfill(
    snps, t3$panel,
    barcodes_used = keep_barcodes,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi
  )

  message("DONE: ", name,
          " | barcodes=", length(keep_barcodes),
          " | panel_n=", nrow(t3$panel),
          " | hapmat=", nrow(hapmat), "x", (ncol(hapmat)-1))

  if (isTRUE(save_outputs)) {
    out_prefix <- paste0("tier3_", name)
    write_tsv(t3$panel, paste0(out_prefix, "_panel.tsv"))
    write_tsv(hapmat,   paste0(out_prefix, "_hapmat.tsv"))
  }

  list(
    name = name,
    params = p,
    barcodes_used = keep_barcodes,
    snps = snps,
    tier3 = t3,
    panel_pos = t3$panel$POS,
    hapmat = hapmat
  )
}

profile_results <- purrr::imap(profiles, ~ run_profile(.x, .y, qc_sub = qc_sub))

summary_tbl <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, function(res, nm) {
  tibble(
    profile = nm,
    tier1_min_reads = res$params$tier1_min_reads,
    n_barcodes = length(res$barcodes_used),
    n_sites_tier2_union = dplyr::n_distinct(res$snps$POS),
    n_sites_final = nrow(res$tier3$panel)
  )
})

print(summary_tbl)




```

## visualizing and inspecting results from above

```{r}

panel_recovery_summary <- imap_dfr(profile_results, function(res, nm) {

  hapmat <- res$hapmat
  panel_n <- length(res$panel_pos)

  # add sample type
  hapmat2 <- hapmat %>%
    left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type),
              by = "barcode")

  # count callable SNPs per barcode
  per_barcode <- hapmat2 %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(barcode, sample_type),
      names_to = "POS",
      values_to = "base"
    ) %>%
    group_by(barcode, sample_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n_callable = sum(!is.na(base)),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      frac_callable = n_callable / panel_n
    )

  # summarise by sample type
  per_barcode %>%
    group_by(sample_type) %>%
    summarise(
      profile = nm,
      tier1_min_reads = res$params$tier1_min_reads,
      panel_size = panel_n,
      n_barcodes = n(),
      mean_callable = mean(n_callable),
      mean_frac_callable = mean(frac_callable),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

})

panel_recovery_summary
```

```{r}

           y = mean_frac_callable,
           fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_col(position="dodge") +
  labs(x="QC Stringency",
       y="Mean fraction of panel recovered",
       fill="Sample type") +
  theme_bw()
```
