```{r}

qc_sub <- read_csv("barcode_master_qc_d10000.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode)) %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA")) %>%
  mutate(sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")))

depth_sum <- read_tsv("panel_depth_summary_dp10.tsv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    barcode = as.character(barcode),
    profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))
  ) %>%
  left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode") %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_type))

pA <- ggplot(depth_sum, aes(x = profile, y = frac_callable_dp10, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  tissue = "#1B9E77",  
  eDNA   = "#D95F02"   
)) + 
  geom_jitter(
  position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.75),
  size = 1.8,
  alpha = 0.7
) +
  labs(
    title = "A) Panel-Site Callability (BAM depth)",
    x = "QC stringency profile",
    y = "Callable fraction\nat panel sites (DP ≥ 10)",
    fill = "Sample type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

alt_recovery_one_profile <- function(res, qc_sub_df) {
  snps <- res$snps
  panel <- res$tier3$panel %>% select(CHROM, POS)
  panel_n <- nrow(panel)
  barcodes_used <- sort(unique(res$barcodes_used))
  vaf_low <- res$params$vaf_low
  min_alt_hi <- res$params$min_alt_hi
  alt_present <- snps %>%
    filter(barcode %in% barcodes_used) %>%
    inner_join(panel, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    mutate(
      is_hi_alt = !is.na(vaf) & (vaf >= vaf_low) & (alt_count >= min_alt_hi)
    ) %>%
    filter(is_hi_alt) %>%
    distinct(barcode, CHROM, POS)
  per_bc <- tibble(barcode = barcodes_used) %>%
    left_join(
      alt_present %>%
        count(barcode, name = "n_alt"),
      by = "barcode"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      n_alt = replace_na(n_alt, 0L),
      panel_size = panel_n,
      frac_alt = n_alt / panel_n
    ) %>%
    left_join(qc_sub_df %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by = "barcode")

  per_bc
}

alt_sum <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, function(res, nm) {
  alt_recovery_one_profile(res, qc_sub) %>%
    mutate(profile = nm)
}) %>%
  mutate(profile = factor(profile, levels = c("strict","moderate","relaxed"))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sample_type))

pB <- ggplot(alt_sum, aes(x = profile, y = frac_alt, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_jitter(
  position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15, dodge.width = 0.75),
  size = 1.8,
  alpha = 0.7
) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  tissue = "#1B9E77",   
  eDNA   = "#D95F02"    
)) + 
  labs(
    title = "B) ALT Recovery at Panel Sites (variant calls)",
    x = "QC stringency profile",
    y = "Fraction of panel sites\nwith high-confidence ALT",
    fill = "Sample type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
fig_AB <- pA / pB + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & theme(legend.position = "right")

fig_AB


```

### backup code

```{r}
calc_alt_recovery <- function(snps, panel_tbl, vaf_low, min_alt_hi) {

  panel_pos <- panel_tbl %>% select(CHROM, POS) %>% distinct()

  # barcode is ALT-present at a panel site if it has a high-confidence ALT row
  alt_hi <- snps %>%
    semi_join(panel_pos, by = c("CHROM","POS")) %>%
    mutate(low_flag = is.na(vaf) | vaf < vaf_low | alt_count < min_alt_hi) %>%
    filter(!low_flag, vaf >= vaf_low) %>%
    distinct(barcode, CHROM, POS)

  panel_size <- nrow(panel_pos)

  alt_hi %>%
    count(barcode, name = "n_alt_hi") %>%
    right_join(tibble(barcode = sort(unique(snps$barcode))), by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(
      n_alt_hi = replace_na(n_alt_hi, 0L),
      panel_size = panel_size,
      frac_alt_hi = n_alt_hi / panel_size
    )
}


## inside each run_profile() -- after t3
alt_recovery <- calc_alt_recovery(snps, t3$panel,
                                 vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
                                 min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi) %>%
  left_join(qc_sub %>% select(barcode, sample_type), by="barcode")

## make BED from the panel 
write_panel_bed <- function(panel_tbl, out_bed) {
  panel_tbl %>%
    distinct(CHROM, POS) %>%
    transmute(CHROM,
              start = POS - 1,
              end   = POS) %>%
    write_tsv(out_bed, col_names = FALSE)
}

```

```{r}
read_depth_set <- function(barcodes, positions, depth_dir="depth") {
  files <- file.path(depth_dir, paste0(barcodes, "_clean.depth"))
  purrr::map2_dfr(files, barcodes, \(f, bc) {
    readr::read_tsv(f, col_names = c("CHROM","POS","DPdepth"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
      filter(POS %in% positions) %>%
      mutate(barcode = bc)
  })
}

```

```{r}
build_panel_from_calls <- function(set_calls,
                                   callable_thresh = 0.60,
                                   min_alt_hi = 2,
                                   maf_min = 0.20) {

  pos_callable <- set_calls %>%
    group_by(POS) %>%
    summarise(frac_callable = mean(callable), .groups="drop")

  keepA <- pos_callable %>% filter(frac_callable >= callable_thresh)

  # (B) ALT support >= min_alt_hi (among callable barcodes)
  alt_support <- set_calls %>%
    filter(call == "ALT") %>%
    group_by(POS) %>%
    summarise(n_alt = n_distinct(barcode), .groups="drop")

  keepB <- alt_support %>% filter(n_alt >= min_alt_hi)

  # (C) MAF from hard REF/ALT calls across barcodes
  maf_tbl <- set_calls %>%
    filter(callable) %>%
    group_by(POS, call) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups="drop") %>%
    group_by(POS) %>%
    mutate(freq = n / sum(n)) %>%
    summarise(maf = 1 - max(freq), .groups="drop")

  keepC <- maf_tbl %>% filter(maf >= maf_min)

  # final
  Reduce(intersect, list(keepA$POS, keepB$POS, keepC$POS))
}


```

# tier 3 QC with three folders

```{r}
read_profile_snps <- function(dir) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

  df <- tibble(file = files) %>%
    mutate(
      barcode = str_remove(basename(file), "_snps\\.tsv$"),
      dat = map(file, ~ readr::read_tsv(.x, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE))
    ) %>%
    unnest(dat)

  if (!"DP4" %in% names(df)) {
    stop("DP4 column missing after reading. Columns are: ", paste(names(df), collapse = ", "))
  }

  df %>%
    mutate(
      DP   = as.numeric(.data$DP),
      QUAL = as.numeric(.data$QUAL),
      DP4  = str_replace(str_trim(.data$DP4), ",+$", ""),
      dp4  = str_split(.data$DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      rf = as.numeric(dp4[, 1]),
      rr = as.numeric(dp4[, 2]),
      af = as.numeric(dp4[, 3]),
      ar = as.numeric(dp4[, 4]),
      alt_count = af + ar,
      vaf = alt_count / DP,
      site_id = paste(.data$CHROM, .data$POS, .data$REF, .data$ALT, sep = ":")
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, alt_count, vaf)
}

tier3_setD_style <- function(snp_long,
                             dp_low = 30,
                             vaf_low = 0.70,
                             missing_max = 0.60,
                             maf_min = 0.25,
                             min_alt_hi = 2) {

  barcodes <- sort(unique(snp_long$barcode))
  sites    <- sort(unique(snp_long$site_id))

  dat <- tidyr::expand_grid(site_id = sites, barcode = barcodes) %>%
    left_join(snp_long, by = c("site_id","barcode")) %>%
    mutate(
      low_flag = is.na(.data$DP) | is.na(.data$vaf) | (.data$DP < dp_low) | (.data$vaf < vaf_low),
      allele = if_else(low_flag, NA_character_, if_else(.data$vaf >= vaf_low, .data$ALT, .data$REF)),
      alt_hi = (!low_flag) & (.data$vaf >= vaf_low)
    )

  site_missing <- dat %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    summarise(frac_low = mean(low_flag), .groups = "drop")

  keep_1 <- site_missing %>%
    filter(frac_low < missing_max) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  dat1 <- dat %>% filter(site_id %in% keep_1)

  alt_support <- dat1 %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    summarise(n_alt_hi = sum(alt_hi, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  keep_2 <- alt_support %>%
    filter(n_alt_hi >= min_alt_hi) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  dat2 <- dat1 %>% filter(site_id %in% keep_2)

  maf_tbl <- dat2 %>%
    filter(!is.na(allele)) %>%
    count(site_id, allele, name = "n") %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    mutate(freq = n / sum(n)) %>%
    summarise(maf = 1 - max(freq), .groups = "drop")

  keep_3 <- maf_tbl %>%
    filter(maf >= maf_min) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  dat_final <- dat2 %>% filter(site_id %in% keep_3)

  list(
    dat_final = dat_final,
    sites_final = sort(unique(dat_final$site_id)),
    site_missing = site_missing,
    alt_support = alt_support,
    maf_tbl = maf_tbl
  )
}

build_outputs <- function(dat_final) {
  hard_mat <- dat_final %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, allele) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = site_id, values_from = allele)

  vaf_mat <- dat_final %>%
    mutate(vaf_clean = if_else(low_flag, NA_real_, vaf)) %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, vaf_clean) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = site_id, values_from = vaf_clean)

  barcode_qc <- dat_final %>%
    group_by(barcode) %>%
    summarise(
      n_sites_retained = n_distinct(site_id),
      n_callable = sum(!low_flag),
      frac_low = mean(low_flag),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(hard_mat = hard_mat, vaf_mat = vaf_mat, barcode_qc = barcode_qc)
}

profiles <- list(
  strict   = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_strict_d10000",   dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.70, missing_max=0.60, maf_min=0.25, min_alt_hi=2),
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000", dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.65, missing_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20, min_alt_hi=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",  dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.60, missing_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15, min_alt_hi=2)
)

run_profile <- function(p) {
  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir)

  f <- tier3_setD_style(
    snps,
    dp_low = p$dp_low,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    missing_max = p$missing_max,
    maf_min = p$maf_min,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi
  )

  outs <- build_outputs(f$dat_final)

  list(
    snps = snps,
    tier3 = f,
    hard_mat = outs$hard_mat,
    vaf_mat  = outs$vaf_mat,
    barcode_qc = outs$barcode_qc
  )
}
```

```{r}
read_profile_snps <- function(dir) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
  colspec <- readr::cols(
    CHROM = readr::col_character(),
    POS   = readr::col_integer(),
    REF   = readr::col_character(),
    ALT   = readr::col_character(),
    QUAL  = readr::col_double(),
    DP    = readr::col_double(),
    DP4   = readr::col_character()
  )

  tibble(file = files) %>%
    mutate(
      barcode = stringr::str_remove(basename(file), "_snps\\.tsv$"),
      dat = purrr::map(file, ~ readr::read_tsv(.x,
        col_types = colspec,
        show_col_types = FALSE,
        progress = FALSE
      ))
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(dat) %>%
    mutate(
      DP4 = stringr::str_replace(stringr::str_trim(.data$DP4), ",+$", ""),
      dp4 = stringr::str_split(.data$DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      rf = as.numeric(dp4[, 1]),
      rr = as.numeric(dp4[, 2]),
      af = as.numeric(dp4[, 3]),
      ar = as.numeric(dp4[, 4]),
      alt_count = af + ar,
      vaf = alt_count / .data$DP,
      site_id = paste(.data$CHROM, .data$POS, .data$REF, .data$ALT, sep=":")
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, alt_count, vaf)
}

```

```{r}
profile_results <- purrr::imap(profiles, \(p, name) run_profile(p))

summary_tbl <- purrr::imap_dfr(profile_results, \(res, name){
  tibble(
    profile = name,
    n_barcodes = n_distinct(res$snps$barcode),
    n_sites_tier2_union = n_distinct(res$snps$site_id),
    n_sites_final = length(res$tier3$sites_final)
  )
})

summary_tbl

```

### changing ref / alt pos

```{r}
read_profile_snps <- function(dir) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

  colspec <- readr::cols(
    CHROM = readr::col_character(),
    POS   = readr::col_integer(),
    REF   = readr::col_character(),
    ALT   = readr::col_character(),
    QUAL  = readr::col_double(),
    DP    = readr::col_double(),
    DP4   = readr::col_character()
  )

  tibble(file = files) %>%
    mutate(
      barcode = stringr::str_remove(basename(file), "_snps\\.tsv$"),
      dat = purrr::map(file, ~ readr::read_tsv(.x, col_types = colspec, show_col_types = FALSE))
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(dat) %>%
    mutate(
      DP4 = stringr::str_replace(stringr::str_trim(.data$DP4), ",+$", ""),
      dp4 = stringr::str_split(.data$DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      af = as.numeric(dp4[,3]),
      ar = as.numeric(dp4[,4]),
      alt_count = af + ar,
      vaf = alt_count / .data$DP,
      locus_id = paste(.data$CHROM, .data$POS, .data$REF, sep=":")
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, locus_id, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, alt_count, vaf)
}

tier3_locus <- function(snp_long,
                        dp_low = 30,
                        vaf_low = 0.70,
                        missing_max = 0.60,
                        maf_min = 0.25,
                        min_alt_hi = 2) {

  barcodes <- sort(unique(snp_long$barcode))
  loci     <- sort(unique(snp_long$locus_id))

  dat <- tidyr::expand_grid(locus_id = loci, barcode = barcodes) %>%
    left_join(snp_long, by = c("locus_id","barcode")) %>%
    mutate(
      low_flag = is.na(DP) | is.na(vaf) | DP < dp_low | vaf < vaf_low,
      # hard call: ALT if vaf>=vaf_low, else REF; NA if low
      allele = if_else(low_flag, NA_character_,
                       if_else(vaf >= vaf_low, ALT, REF)),
      alt_hi = (!low_flag) & (vaf >= vaf_low)
    )

  # locus missing/low fraction
  locus_lowfrac <- dat %>%
    group_by(locus_id) %>%
    summarise(frac_low = mean(low_flag), .groups="drop")

  keep1 <- locus_lowfrac %>% filter(frac_low < missing_max) %>% pull(locus_id)
  dat1 <- dat %>% filter(locus_id %in% keep1)

  alt_support <- dat1 %>%
    group_by(locus_id) %>%
    summarise(n_alt_hi = sum(alt_hi, na.rm = TRUE), .groups="drop")

  keep2 <- alt_support %>% filter(n_alt_hi >= min_alt_hi) %>% pull(locus_id)
  dat2 <- dat1 %>% filter(locus_id %in% keep2)

  # MAF from hard calls across barcodes
  maf_tbl <- dat2 %>%
    filter(!is.na(allele)) %>%
    count(locus_id, allele, name="n") %>%
    group_by(locus_id) %>%
    mutate(freq = n / sum(n)) %>%
    summarise(maf = 1 - max(freq), .groups="drop")

  keep3 <- maf_tbl %>% filter(maf >= maf_min) %>% pull(locus_id)
  dat_final <- dat2 %>% filter(locus_id %in% keep3)

  list(
    dat_final = dat_final,
    loci_final = sort(unique(dat_final$locus_id)),
    locus_lowfrac = locus_lowfrac,
    alt_support = alt_support,
    maf_tbl = maf_tbl
  )
}


profiles <- list(
  strict   = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_strict_d10000",   dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.70, missing_max=0.60, maf_min=0.25, min_alt_hi=2),
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000", dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.65, missing_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20, min_alt_hi=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",  dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.60, missing_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15, min_alt_hi=2)
)

run_profile <- function(p) {
  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir)
  f <- tier3_locus(snps,
    dp_low = p$dp_low,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    missing_max = p$missing_max,
    maf_min = p$maf_min,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi
  )
  tibble(
    n_barcodes = n_distinct(snps$barcode),
    n_loci_tier2_union = n_distinct(snps$locus_id),
    n_loci_final = length(f$loci_final)
  )
}

summary_tbl <- purrr::imap_dfr(profiles, \(p, name){
  run_profile(p) %>% mutate(profile = name, .before = 1)
})

summary_tbl

```

```{r}

make_haplotypes_from_hardcalls <- function(hard_mat) {
  dna <- hard_mat %>%
    mutate(across(-barcode, ~ replace_na(.x, "N"))) %>%
    column_to_rownames("barcode") %>%
    as.matrix()

  dnabin <- as.DNAbin(dna)
  h <- haplotype(dnabin)
  net <- haploNet(h)

  list(h = h, net = net)
}

hap_mod <- make_haplotypes_from_hardcalls(profile_results$moderate$hard_mat)
plot(hap_mod$net, main = "Moderate profile haplotype network")

```


```{r}
read_tsv2 <- function(path) readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)

qc <- read_tsv2("mapped_primary_reads.tsv") %>%
  full_join(read_tsv2("raw_fastq_reads.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  left_join(read_tsv2("readlen_stats_per_barcode.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  left_join(read_tsv2("depth_stats_per_barcode.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  left_join(read_tsv2("snpcount_strict_tier2.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  left_join(read_tsv2("snpcount_moderate_tier2.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  left_join(read_tsv2("snpcount_relaxed_tier2.tsv"), by = "barcode") %>%
  mutate(
    pass_250  = mapped_primary_reads >= 250,
    pass_500  = mapped_primary_reads >= 500,
    pass_1000 = mapped_primary_reads >= 1000
  ) %>%
  arrange(as.integer(str_extract(barcode, "\\d+")))

write_csv(qc, "barcode_master_qc_d10000.csv")
write_tsv(qc, "barcode_master_qc_d10000.tsv")

```

```{r}
qc <- qc %>%
  mutate(
    pct_mapped = 100 * mapped_primary_reads / raw_fastq_reads
  )

read_profile_snps <- function(dir) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

  tibble(file = files) %>%
    mutate(
      barcode = str_remove(basename(file), "_snps\\.tsv$"),
      df = map(file, ~ read_tsv(.x,
        col_names = c("CHROM","POS","REF","ALT","QUAL","DP","DP4"),
        show_col_types = FALSE
      ))
    ) %>%
    unnest(df) %>%
    mutate(
      dp4 = str_split(DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      rf = as.numeric(dp4[,1]), rr = as.numeric(dp4[,2]),
      af = as.numeric(dp4[,3]), ar = as.numeric(dp4[,4]),
      alt_count = af + ar,
      vaf = alt_count / DP,
      site_id = paste(CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, sep=":")
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, alt_count, vaf)
}

tier3_filter <- function(snp_long,
                         vaf_low = 0.65,
                         frac_low_max = 0.70,
                         maf_min = 0.20,
                         min_alt_hi = 2) {

  barcodes <- sort(unique(snp_long$barcode))
  grid <- expand_grid(site_id = unique(snp_long$site_id), barcode = barcodes)

  vaf_grid <- grid %>%
    left_join(snp_long %>% select(site_id, barcode, vaf), by=c("site_id","barcode")) %>%
    mutate(
      low = is.na(vaf) | vaf < vaf_low,
      alt_hi = !is.na(vaf) & vaf >= vaf_low
    )

  site_stats <- vaf_grid %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    summarise(
      frac_low = mean(low),
      n_alt_hi = sum(alt_hi),
      .groups="drop"
    )

  sites_keep_1 <- site_stats %>%
    filter(frac_low <= frac_low_max) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  vaf_f1 <- vaf_grid %>% filter(site_id %in% sites_keep_1)

  alt_hi_counts <- vaf_f1 %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    summarise(n_alt_hi = sum(alt_hi), .groups="drop")

  sites_keep_2 <- alt_hi_counts %>%
    filter(n_alt_hi >= min_alt_hi) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  vaf_f2 <- vaf_f1 %>% filter(site_id %in% sites_keep_2)

  maf_tbl <- vaf_f2 %>%
    group_by(site_id) %>%
    summarise(
      p_alt = mean(alt_hi),         # proportion of barcodes with ALT high-confidence
      maf = pmin(p_alt, 1 - p_alt),
      .groups="drop"
    )

  sites_keep_3 <- maf_tbl %>%
    filter(maf >= maf_min) %>%
    pull(site_id)

  vaf_final <- vaf_f2 %>% filter(site_id %in% sites_keep_3)

  snp_long_final <- snp_long %>% filter(site_id %in% sites_keep_3)

  list(
    sites_final = sort(unique(vaf_final$site_id)),
    vaf_grid_final = vaf_final,
    snp_long_final = snp_long_final,
    site_stats = site_stats,
    alt_hi_counts = alt_hi_counts,
    maf_tbl = maf_tbl
  )
}


```

```{r}

panel_barcodes <- c("barcode41","barcode05","barcode13","barcode62")

panel_labels <- c(
  "barcode41" = "A) Tissue (5/5 fragments)",
  "barcode05" = "B) eDNA (3/5 fragments)",
  "barcode13" = "C) eDNA (2/5 fragments)",
  "barcode62" = "D) eDNA (1/5 fragments)"
)

cov_panel <- depth_long %>%
  mutate(barcode = as.character(barcode),
         POS = as.numeric(POS),
         DP  = as.numeric(DP)) %>%
  filter(barcode %in% panel_barcodes) %>%
  mutate(panel = factor(panel_labels[barcode],
                        levels = panel_labels[panel_barcodes]))

ggplot(cov_panel, aes(x = POS, y = DP)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_log10(name = "Depth (log10)") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Position along mitogenome (bp)") +
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
  theme_bw() +
```

```{r}
depth_use <- depth_long %>%
  filter(profile == "strict")  # or moderate / relaxed

depth_use <- depth_long

thr <- c(1, 10, 50, 100)

genome_pos <- depth_use %>% distinct(POS) %>% nrow()

sample_type_df <- master_clean %>%
  select(barcode, sample_type) %>%
  distinct()

cov_stats <- depth_use %>%
  mutate(DP = as.numeric(DP)) %>%
  group_by(barcode) %>%
  summarise(
    cov_1x   = mean(DP >= 1,   na.rm = TRUE),
    cov_10x  = mean(DP >= 10,  na.rm = TRUE),
    cov_50x  = mean(DP >= 50,  na.rm = TRUE),
    cov_100x = mean(DP >= 100, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

names(cov_stats)
cov_plot_df <- cov_stats %>%
  left_join(sample_type_df, by = "barcode") %>%
  mutate(sample_type = factor(sample_type, levels = c("tissue","eDNA")))

cov_long <- cov_plot_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("cov_"),
    names_to = "coverage_level",
    values_to = "proportion"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    coverage_level = factor(
      coverage_level,
      levels = c("cov_1x","cov_10x","cov_50x","cov_100x"),
      labels = c("≥1×","≥10×","≥50×","≥100×")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(sample_type %in% c("tissue","eDNA"))

cov_long_bar <- cov_long %>%
  group_by(coverage_level) %>%
  mutate(barcode_ord = fct_reorder(barcode, proportion)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cov_long_bar, aes(x = barcode_ord, y = proportion, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ coverage_level, ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(tissue = "grey20", eDNA = "orchid2")) +
  labs(
    title = "Breadth of mitochondrial genome coverage by barcode",
    x = "Barcode",
    y = "Proportion of genome covered",
    fill = "Sample type"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(tissue = "grey20", eDNA = "orchid2")) +
  labs(

    x = "",
    y = "Proportion of genome covered",
```



```{r}
read_profile_snps <- function(dir) {
  files <- list.files(dir, pattern = "_snps\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)

  read_one <- function(path) {
    x <- readr::read_tsv(path,
      col_names = c("CHROM","POS","REF","ALT","QUAL","DP","DP4"),
      show_col_types = FALSE,
      progress = FALSE
    )
    if (!"DP4" %in% names(x)) stop("DP4 column missing in: ", path)

    x %>%
      mutate(
        DP  = as.numeric(DP),
        QUAL = as.numeric(QUAL),
        DP4 = str_trim(DP4),
        DP4 = str_replace(DP4, ",+$", "")  
      )
  }

  tibble(file = files) %>%
    mutate(
      barcode = str_remove(basename(file), "_snps\\.tsv$"),
      df = map(file, read_one)
    ) %>%
    unnest(df) %>%
    mutate(
      dp4 = str_split(DP4, ",", simplify = TRUE),
      rf = as.numeric(dp4[,1]),
      rr = as.numeric(dp4[,2]),
      af = as.numeric(dp4[,3]),
      ar = as.numeric(dp4[,4]),
      alt_count = af + ar,
      vaf = alt_count / DP,
      site_id = paste(CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, sep=":")
    ) %>%
    select(barcode, site_id, CHROM, POS, REF, ALT, QUAL, DP, alt_count, vaf)
}

```

```{r}
profiles <- list(
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000", vaf_low=0.65, frac_low_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20, min_alt_hi=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",  vaf_low=0.60, frac_low_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15, min_alt_hi=2),
  strict   = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_strict_d10000",   vaf_low=0.70, frac_low_max=0.60, maf_min=0.25, min_alt_hi=2)
)

results <- imap_dfr(profiles, \(p, name){
  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir)
  f <- tier3_filter(snps, vaf_low=p$vaf_low, frac_low_max=p$frac_low_max, maf_min=p$maf_min, min_alt_hi=p$min_alt_hi)

  tibble(
    profile = name,
    n_barcodes = n_distinct(snps$barcode),
    n_sites_tier2_union = n_distinct(snps$site_id),
    n_sites_final = length(f$sites_final)
  )
})
readr::read_tsv("snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000/barcode01_snps.tsv") %>% head()

results

```


```{r}
profiles <- list(
  strict   = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_strict_d10000",   dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.70, frac_low_max=0.60, maf_min=0.25, min_alt_hi=2),
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000", dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.65, frac_low_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20, min_alt_hi=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",  dp_low=30, vaf_low=0.60, frac_low_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15, min_alt_hi=2)
)

results <- purrr::imap_dfr(profiles, \(p, name){
  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir)

  f <- tier3_filter_like_setD(
    snps,
    dp_low = p$dp_low,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    frac_low_max = p$frac_low_max,
    maf_min = p$maf_min,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi
  )

  tibble(
    profile = name,
    n_barcodes = dplyr::n_distinct(snps$barcode),
    n_sites_tier2_union = dplyr::n_distinct(snps$site_id),
    n_sites_final = length(f$sites_final)
  )
})

results

```

```{r}

reads <- read_tsv("mapped_primary_reads.tsv", col_names = c("barcode","mapped_primary_reads"))
len   <- read_tsv("readlen_stats_per_barcode.tsv")
dep   <- read_tsv("depth_stats_per_barcode.tsv")

df <- reads %>%
  mutate(
    bin = case_when(
      mapped_primary_reads >= 1000 ~ ">=1000",
      mapped_primary_reads >= 500  ~ ">=500",
      mapped_primary_reads >= 250  ~ ">=250",
      TRUE                         ~ "<250"
    ),
    bin = factor(bin, levels=c("<250",">=250",">=500",">=1000"))
  ) %>%
  left_join(len, by="barcode") %>%
  left_join(dep, by="barcode")

# median read length by barcode (distribution)
ggplot(df, aes(x = median_len)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=40) +
  labs(x="Median mapped read length (bp)", y="Number of barcodes")

# mean depth distribution
ggplot(df, aes(x = mean_depth)) +
  geom_histogram(bins=40) +
  labs(x="Mean depth across mitogenome", y="Number of barcodes")

# relationship: mapped reads vs mean depth
ggplot(df, aes(x = mapped_primary_reads, y = mean_depth)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x="Mapped primary reads (log10)", y="Mean depth")

# boxplots by Tier-1 bin
ggplot(df, aes(x = bin, y = median_len)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x="Tier-1 bin", y="Median mapped read length (bp)")

ggplot(df, aes(x = bin, y = mean_depth)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x="Tier-1 bin", y="Mean depth across mitogenome")


```

```{r}
profiles <- list(
  moderate = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_moderate_d10000", vaf_low=0.65, frac_low_max=0.70, maf_min=0.20, min_alt_hi=2),
  relaxed  = list(dir="snp_tables_medaka_relaxed_d10000",  vaf_low=0.60, frac_low_max=0.80, maf_min=0.15, min_alt_hi=2)
)

results <- imap(profiles, \(p, name){
  snps <- read_profile_snps(p$dir)
  f <- tier3_filter(
    snps,
    vaf_low = p$vaf_low,
    frac_low_max = p$frac_low_max,
    maf_min = p$maf_min,
    min_alt_hi = p$min_alt_hi
  )
  tibble(
    profile = name,
    n_barcodes = n_distinct(snps$barcode),
    n_sites_tier2_union = n_distinct(snps$site_id),
    n_sites_final = length(f$sites_final)
  )
})

bind_rows(results)

```
